units.title: Eyes of Wakanda
units.overview: Follow the adventures of brave Wakandan warriors throughout history in this globe-trotting adventure, where they must carry out dangerous missions to retrieve Vibranium artifacts from the enemies of Wakanda. They are the Hatut Zaraze and this is their story.

episodes.name: Into the Lion's Den
episodes.overview: A former member of the Dora Milaje is sent to take down a rogue Wakandan known as The Lion.

episodes.name: Legends and Lies
episodes.overview: Amidst the Trojan War, a soldier attempts to breach the city's defenses to retrieve an artifact.

episodes.name: Lost and Found
episodes.overview: A powerful stowaway infiltrates the Golden City and threatens the secrets kept within.

episodes.name: The Last Panther
episodes.overview: Two Wakandans must choose to complete their mission or defy their homeland and save their world.

units.note: Anthology across millennia; curated at the head of the timeline.

units.title: Captain America: The First Avenger
units.overview: During World War II, Steve Rogers is a sickly man from Brooklyn who's transformed into super-soldier Captain America to aid in the war effort. Rogers must stop the Red Skull – Adolf Hitler's ruthless head of weaponry, and the leader of an organization that intends to use a mysterious device of untold powers for world domination.

units.title: Agent Carter
units.overview: It's 1946, and peace has dealt Peggy Carter a serious blow as she finds herself marginalized when the men return home from fighting abroad. Working for the covert SSR (Strategic Scientific Reserve), Peggy must balance doing administrative work and going on secret missions for Howard Stark all while trying to navigate life as a single woman in America, in the wake of losing the love of her life - Steve Rogers.

episodes.name: Now Is Not the End
episodes.overview: In 1946, Peggy Carter is now a secretary for the Strategic Scientific Reserve. Howard Stark asks her for help when the country believes that he is selling deadly weapons to their enemies.

episodes.name: Bridge and Tunnel
episodes.overview: Howard Stark's deadliest weapon has fallen into enemy hands, and only Agent Carter can recover it. But can she do so before her undercover mission is discovered by SSR Chief Dooley and Agent Thompson?

episodes.name: Time and Tide
episodes.overview: As Agent Carter closes in on Howard Stark's stolen technology, Peggy's secret mission could unravel when the SSR arrests Jarvis and a secret is revealed.

episodes.name: The Blitzkrieg Button
episodes.overview: Peggy may be in more trouble than usual when fugitive Howard Stark suddenly returns for mysterious reasons. And Chief Dooley chases a new clue all the way to Europe that threatens to destroy Peggy's future at the SSR.

episodes.name: The Iron Ceiling
episodes.overview: Peggy is finally trusted with a mission and calls upon her trusted Howling Commandos squad for backup. But her cover could be at risk when SSR Chief Dooley also sends Agent Thompson with her.

episodes.name: A Sin to Err
episodes.overview: Peggy discovers the shocking truth about Leviathan but doesn't realize that her true enemies are even closer than she imagined. Meanwhile, Souza is close to confirming the truth about Peggy and may just put her in the crosshairs of the SSR.

episodes.name: SNAFU
episodes.overview: Peggy is cornered and more vulnerable than ever as Leviathan makes their move against her. As the SSR zeroes in on Howard Stark, they may pay the ultimate price as they find their true enemy is closer than they realized.

episodes.name: Valediction
episodes.overview: Peggy faces the full fury of Leviathan, as Howard Stark makes his return.

units.title: Agent Carter (Season 2)
units.overview: It's 1946, and peace has dealt Peggy Carter a serious blow as she finds herself marginalized when the men return home from fighting abroad. Working for the covert SSR (Strategic Scientific Reserve), Peggy must balance doing administrative work and going on secret missions for Howard Stark all while trying to navigate life as a single woman in America, in the wake of losing the love of her life - Steve Rogers.

episodes.name: The Lady in the Lake
episodes.overview: Peggy moves to the City of Angels to help Chief Daniel Sousa at the West Coast Strategic Scientific Reserve (SSR) investigate a bizarre homicide involving an alleged killer and Isodyne Energy, and reunites with some familiar faces.

episodes.name: A View in the Dark
episodes.overview: Peggy discovers her murder investigation has huge ramifications that can destroy her career, as well as everyone near and dear to her.

episodes.name: Better Angels
episodes.overview: Peggy’s search for the truth about Zero Matter puts her on a collision course with her superiors as Howard Stark barnstorms in.

episodes.name: Smoke and Mirrors
episodes.overview: Agent Carter and the SSR learn there’s more than just a pretty face behind Hollywood star Whitney Frost, Peggy’s most dangerous foe yet.

episodes.name: The Atomic Job
episodes.overview: As Jarvis' precision and quick-thinking skills are put to the ultimate test, Peggy must find a way to stop an atomic explosion that threatens to destroy all of California.

episodes.name: Life of the Party
episodes.overview: When Agent Peggy Carter realizes she cannot save Wilkes on her own, she turns to her most unexpected adversary for help, while Whitney makes a move to control the deadly Zero Matter.

episodes.name: Monsters
episodes.overview: As Agent Carter plots a rescue mission, Whitney Frost hunts for even more dark power, and Jarvis learns not to make promises he cannot keep.

episodes.name: The Edge of Mystery
episodes.overview: Peggy and Sousa propose a trade with Whitney Frost, while the SSR gets help from Howard Stark that may be the key to eliminating Zero Matter.

episodes.name: A Little Song and Dance
episodes.overview: Peggy desperately tries to save Dr. Wilkes with a dangerous plan to stop Whitney Frost. But Thompson makes a surprising move that could destroy them all.

episodes.name: Hollywood Ending
episodes.overview: Peggy needs Howard Stark to eliminate Zero Matter as they are faced with a mission none of them could come back from.

units.title: One-Shot: Agent Carter
units.overview: Agent Peggy Carter is relegated to a desk job and frustrated at her male boss and comrades' sexist dismissal of her place in the SSR. Ordered to work late one night, Carter gets an alert that the villain Zodiac has been spotted and decides to take care of it herself.

units.title: Captain Marvel
units.overview: The story follows Carol Danvers as she becomes one of the universe’s most powerful heroes when Earth is caught in the middle of a galactic war between two alien races. Set in the 1990s, Captain Marvel is an all-new adventure from a previously unseen period in the history of the Marvel Cinematic Universe.
units.note: Watch the mid-credits scene only after Avengers: Infinity War.

units.title: Iron Man
units.overview: After being held captive in an Afghan cave, billionaire engineer Tony Stark creates a unique weaponized suit of armor to fight evil.

units.title: Iron Man 2
units.overview: With the world now aware of his dual life as the armored superhero Iron Man, billionaire inventor Tony Stark faces pressure from the government, the press and the public to share his technology with the military. Unwilling to let go of his invention, Stark, with Pepper Potts and James 'Rhodey' Rhodes at his side, must forge new alliances – and confront powerful enemies.

units.title: The Incredible Hulk
units.overview: Scientist Bruce Banner scours the planet for an antidote to the unbridled force of rage within him: the Hulk. But when the military masterminds who dream of exploiting his powers force him back to civilization, he finds himself coming face to face with a new, deadly foe.

units.title: One-Shot: A Funny Thing Happened on the Way to Thor's Hammer
units.overview: Agent Coulson stops at a convenience store and deals with a coincidental robbery during his visit.

units.title: Thor
units.overview: Against his father Odin's will, The Mighty Thor - a powerful but arrogant warrior god - recklessly reignites an ancient war. Thor is cast down to Earth and forced to live among humans as punishment. Once here, Thor learns what it takes to be a true hero when the most dangerous villain of his world sends the darkest forces of Asgard to invade Earth.

units.title: One-Shot: The Consultant
units.overview: Agent Coulson informs Agent Sitwell that the World Security Council wishes Emil Blonsky to be released from prison to join the Avengers Initiative. As Nick Fury doesn't want to release Blonsky, the two agents decide to send a patsy to sabotage the meeting...

units.title: The Avengers
units.overview: When an unexpected enemy emerges and threatens global safety and security, Nick Fury, director of the international peacekeeping agency known as S.H.I.E.L.D., finds himself in need of a team to pull the world back from the brink of disaster. Spanning the globe, a daring recruitment effort begins!

units.title: One-Shot: Item 47
units.overview: Benny and Claire, a down-on-their-luck couple, find a discarded Chitauri weapon referred to as 'Item 47'.

units.title: Agents of S.H.I.E.L.D. · S1 · E1–7
units.overview: Agent Phil Coulson of S.H.I.E.L.D. (Strategic Homeland Intervention, Enforcement and Logistics Division) puts together a team of agents to investigate the new, the strange and the unknown around the globe, protecting the ordinary from the extraordinary.

episodes.name: Pilot
episodes.overview: After the events of The Avengers, S.H.I.E.L.D. Agent Phil Coulson assembles a small team of agents to investigate a mysterious group called the Rising Tide. In doing so, they encounter Mike Peterson, a man who has acquired superhuman powers.

Coulson and his S.H.I.E.L.D. agents travel to Peru to investigate an object of unknown origin, codenamed 0-8-4. But when he runs into Comandante Camilla Reyes, more than just sparks fly at 30,000 feet.

episodes.name: The Asset
episodes.overview: When the brilliant scientist, Dr. Franklin Hall, is kidnapped, Agent Coulson and his S.H.I.E.L.D. agents must race against the clock to locate him. Skye is their only way in–pushing the team to their limits when the entire plan turns upside-down.

episodes.name: Eye Spy
episodes.overview: Agent Coulson and the S.H.I.E.L.D. team try to track down a mysterious woman who has single-handedly committed numerous high-stakes heists. But when the woman’s identity is revealed, a troubling secret stands to ruin Coulson.

episodes.name: Girl in the Flower Dress
episodes.overview: An elusive girl in a flower dress may hold the key to the mystery that brings Coulson and team to Asia to rescue a young man with an unusual and dangerous power; and Skye has a secret that jeopardizes her relationship with the team right when they need her most.

episodes.name: FZZT
episodes.overview: When floating bodies turn up, Coulson and the agents of S.H.I.E.L.D. must hunt down an elusive killer. No one is safe - not even the team.

episodes.name: The Hub
episodes.overview: Dangerous secrets are being kept from Coulson's Team, and he works the system to save Ward and Fitz when they are sent on a Level 8 classified mission that may end in tragedy.

units.title: Thor: The Dark World
units.overview: Thor fights to restore order across the cosmos… but an ancient race led by the vengeful Malekith returns to plunge the universe back into darkness. Faced with an enemy that even Odin and Asgard cannot withstand, Thor must embark on his most perilous and personal journey yet, one that will reunite him with Jane Foster and force him to sacrifice everything to save us all.

units.title: Agents of S.H.I.E.L.D. · S1 · E8–16
units.overview: Agent Phil Coulson of S.H.I.E.L.D. (Strategic Homeland Intervention, Enforcement and Logistics Division) puts together a team of agents to investigate the new, the strange and the unknown around the globe, protecting the ordinary from the extraordinary.

episodes.name: The Well
episodes.overview: In the aftermath of the events chronicled in the feature film Marvel's Thor: The Dark World, Coulson and the agents of S.H.I.E.L.D. pick up the pieces–one of which threatens to destroy a member of the team.

episodes.name: Repairs
episodes.overview: Coulson and his team are haunted by a ghost that threatens to destroy them all, and only a secret from May's past can save them.

episodes.name: The Bridge
episodes.overview: In a shocking cliffhanger episode, Coulson takes the war back to Centipede, and this time he brings in Michael Peterson for some super-soldier support. As they get closer to the truth, startling secrets are revealed and an unexpected twist threatens the team.

episodes.name: The Magical Place
episodes.overview: S.H.I.E.L.D. organizes a full scale hunt for Coulson. Meanwhile, Coulson uncovers vital information about the mystery of his death, but, with Centipede out for blood, this knowledge may come at the cost of one of the team!

episodes.name: Seeds
episodes.overview: Coulson and May uncover startling information about Skye's past, while the team is swept into a storm at a S.H.I.E.L.D. Academy of Science and Technology.

episodes.name: T.R.A.C.K.S.
episodes.overview: Hot on the trail of The Clairvoyant, Coulson and his team board a mystery train that seems to be headed for certain death.

episodes.name: T.A.H.I.T.I.
episodes.overview: Coulson goes on the attack to save Skye by enlisting the aid of Ward's former S.O. John Garrett and uncovers shocking truths about his own life and S.H.I.E.L.D.

episodes.name: Yes Men
episodes.overview: When Coulson and his team are attacked by Lorelei - a deadly seductress who escaped from Asgard - Thor’s Lady Sif, her longtime nemesis, steps in to try to save them.

episodes.name: End of the Beginning
episodes.overview: Agents Garrett and Triplett are back to help Coulson's Team track down S.H.I.E.L.D.'s nefarious enemy--The Clairvoyant. But will Deathlok destroy them all to protect his master's identity?

units.title: Iron Man 3
units.overview: When Tony Stark's world is torn apart by a formidable terrorist called the Mandarin, he starts an odyssey of rebuilding and retribution.

units.title: One-Shot: All Hail the King
units.overview: A documentary filmmaker interviews the now-famous Trevor Slattery from behind bars.

units.title: Captain America: The Winter Soldier
units.overview: After the cataclysmic events in New York with The Avengers, Steve Rogers, aka Captain America is living quietly in Washington, D.C. and trying to adjust to the modern world. But when a S.H.I.E.L.D. colleague comes under attack, Steve becomes embroiled in a web of intrigue that threatens to put the world at risk. Joining forces with the Black Widow, Captain America struggles to expose the ever-widening conspiracy while fighting off professional assassins sent to silence him at every turn. When the full scope of the villainous plot is revealed, Captain America and the Black Widow enlist the help of a new ally, the Falcon. However, they soon find themselves up against an unexpected and formidable enemy—the Winter Soldier.

units.title: Agents of S.H.I.E.L.D. · S1 · E17–22
units.overview: Agent Phil Coulson of S.H.I.E.L.D. (Strategic Homeland Intervention, Enforcement and Logistics Division) puts together a team of agents to investigate the new, the strange and the unknown around the globe, protecting the ordinary from the extraordinary.

episodes.name: Turn, Turn, Turn
episodes.overview: Coulson and his team find themselves without anyone they can trust, only to discover that they are trapped with a traitor in their midst.

episodes.name: Providence
episodes.overview: With Colonel Glenn Talbot now on their trail, Coulson and his team seek refuge in the last place anyone would look, where they begin to uncover S.H.I.E.L.D.'s most dangerous secrets. Secrets that could destroy them all.

episodes.name: The Only Light in the Darkness
episodes.overview: With their world turned upside down, Coulson races to save the life of his one true love as the mystery of "The Cellist," which began in Marvel's The Avengers, is finally revealed.

episodes.name: Nothing Personal
episodes.overview: Just when there's no one left to trust, Agent Maria Hill returns to team up with Coulson as S.H.I.E.L.D. is being destroyed around them.

episodes.name: Ragtag
episodes.overview: Ward's betrayal and HYDRA's shocking secrets are revealed as Coulson's team goes undercover on a mission that leaves no one unscathed.

episodes.name: Beginning of the End
episodes.overview: Dark secrets are revealed as Coulson and his team put everything on the line to stop Garrett and the forces of HYDRA.

units.title: Guardians of the Galaxy
units.overview: Light years from Earth, 26 years after being abducted, Peter Quill finds himself the prime target of a manhunt after discovering an orb wanted by Ronan the Accuser.

units.title: Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2
units.overview: The Guardians must fight to keep their newfound family together as they unravel the mysteries of Peter Quill's true parentage.

units.title: I Am Groot (Season 1)
units.overview: There's no guarding the galaxy from this mischievous toddler! Get ready as Baby Groot takes center stage in his very own collection of shorts, exploring his glory days growing up and getting into trouble among the stars.

episodes.name: Groot's First Steps
episodes.overview: Baby Groot takes his first steps out of his pot, only to learn you have to walk before you can run.

episodes.name: The Little Guy
episodes.overview: Groot discovers a miniature civilization that believes the seemingly enormous tree toddler is the hero they’ve been waiting for.

episodes.name: Groot's Pursuit
episodes.overview: Groot investigates a spooky noise that’s been haunting the Quadrant, which leads to an intense dance off.

episodes.name: Groot Takes a Bath
episodes.overview: Everybody needs some alone time to relax and wash up, but things go quite differently when you’re a Flora Colossi toddler.

episodes.name: Magnum Opus
episodes.overview: Groot sets out to paint a family portrait of himself and the Guardians, only to discover just how messy the artistic process can be.

units.title: I Am Groot (Season 2)
units.overview: There's no guarding the galaxy from this mischievous toddler! Get ready as Baby Groot takes center stage in his very own collection of shorts, exploring his glory days growing up and getting into trouble among the stars.

episodes.name: Are You My Groot?
episodes.overview: Groot stumbles across a strange egg in a nest while exploring the alien planet of Terma. He instantly falls for the little creature that emerges when the egg cracks, adopting it as his own.

episodes.name: Groot Noses Around
episodes.overview: When Groot discovers a bionic nose-shaped device that grants him a sense of smell, he quickly learns not to stick his new nose where it doesn't belong.

episodes.name: Groot's Snow Day
episodes.overview: After landing on the icy planet of Falligar, Groot fashions a snowman with scraps of junk, inadvertently creating an unstoppable snowman-robot that wreaks havoc.

episodes.name: Groot's Sweet Treat
episodes.overview: As an intergalactic ice cream truck approaches, Groot—desperate to get a treat— frantically scours the ship for coins

episodes.name: Groot and the Great Prophecy
episodes.overview: In this adventure narrated by The Watcher, Groot finds himself in the heart of an ancient Drez-Lar temple with a mythic prophecy he must fulfill to save the universe.

units.title: Daredevil (Season 1)
units.overview: Lawyer-by-day Matt Murdock uses his heightened senses from being blinded as a young boy to fight crime at night on the streets of Hell’s Kitchen as Daredevil.

episodes.name: Into the Ring
episodes.overview: Murdock's vigilante crime fighting and his new law practice find equally dangerous challenges in a murder case tied to a corporate crime syndicate.

episodes.name: Cut Man
episodes.overview: Murdock makes a near fatal error while trying to save a kidnapped boy, and finds an unlikely ally when he needs saving himself.

episodes.name: Rabbit in a Snowstorm
episodes.overview: Murdock and Foggy take on a mysterious wealthy client, but Murdock is convinced that there's more to the case than just the facts.

episodes.name: In the Blood
episodes.overview: Two vicious Russian brothers working for Fisk strike back against Daredevil. Fisk moves to further consolidate his power in the criminal underworld.

episodes.name: World on Fire
episodes.overview: Fisk moves forward with plans that threaten to rip Hell's Kitchen apart. Murdock and Foggy take on a case helping tenants victimized by a slumlord.

episodes.name: Condemned
episodes.overview: Daredevil finds himself trapped in the fallout of Fisk's plan to take control of Hell's Kitchen. Ben Urich digs closer to the truth.

episodes.name: Stick
episodes.overview: An important figure from Murdock's past reemerges seeking his help to battle a new enemy threatening Hell's Kitchen.

episodes.name: Shadows in the Glass
episodes.overview: While Murdock, Foggy and Karen's mission becomes clearer, Fisk's world spins further out of control in his battle for Hell's Kitchen.

episodes.name: Speak of the Devil
episodes.overview: When Fisk gains the upper hand, the goal to destroy him becomes even more difficult, while Daredevil faces his own demons.

episodes.name: Nelson v. Murdock
episodes.overview: Murdock and Foggy's relationship is put to the ultimate test while a new enemy against Fisk emerges.

episodes.name: The Path of the Righteous
episodes.overview: Fisk and Murdock wrestle with the consequences of their chosen paths, while Ben and Karen get closer to Fisk's true past.

episodes.name: The Ones We Leave Behind
episodes.overview: Fisk seeks revenge while Karen is haunted by recent events. Daredevil makes a startling discovery about Fisk's financing.

episodes.name: Daredevil
episodes.overview: In the season finale, a boxed-in Fisk and a desperate Murdock, Foggy and Karen are forced to play their end games.

units.title: Agents of S.H.I.E.L.D. · S2 · E1–10
units.overview: Agent Phil Coulson of S.H.I.E.L.D. (Strategic Homeland Intervention, Enforcement and Logistics Division) puts together a team of agents to investigate the new, the strange and the unknown around the globe, protecting the ordinary from the extraordinary.

episodes.name: Shadows
episodes.overview: Coulson and his team are now wanted fugitives with limited resources, but that's not stopping them from keeping the world safe from powerful and unseen threats everywhere. However, with new members they hardly know, will S.H.I.E.L.D. ever be trusted again?

episodes.name: Heavy Is the Head
episodes.overview: Hunted and running out of solutions, Phil Coulson puts his team right in the line of fire in the hopes of saving them all. But with General Glenn Talbot, HYDRA, and Carl Creel all on the attack, can they possibly survive? Meanwhile, a mysterious Doctor harbors some dangerous secrets that could destroy one of our core team members.

episodes.name: Making Friends and Influencing People
episodes.overview: Coulson and his team race against HYDRA to get to Donnie Gill--a dangerous gifted with the ability to freeze objects--while Simmons is caught in the crossfire.

episodes.name: Face My Enemy
episodes.overview: While on a mission to learn more about the secrets of the mysterious writing, Coulson finds himself attacked by the only person he can trust: Agent Melinda May. Meanwhile, the rest of the team is trapped in an explosive situation, and it's up to Fitz to save them--but is he up to it?

episodes.name: A Hen in the Wolf House
episodes.overview: Coulson's team is up against the beautiful and deadly Bobbi Morse--Security Chief for HYDRA. Meanwhile, Skye's father forces Raina to reunite him with his daughter at any cost.

episodes.name: A Fractured House
episodes.overview: The world turns against S.H.I.E.L.D. when HYDRA impersonates them to attack The United Nations, and an unexpected enemy leads the charge to bring about their downfall.

episodes.name: The Writing on the Wall
episodes.overview: The team discovers murder victims with the alien glyphs on them that Coulson's been etching. All of Coulson's secrets and lies come to a head.

episodes.name: The Things We Bury
episodes.overview: Coulson and team find themselves in an epic face-off against HYDRA to uncover an ancient secret, while Ward kidnaps his brother, Senator Christian Ward, for a violent trip down memory lane.

episodes.name: ...Ye Who Enter Here
episodes.overview: S.H.I.E.L.D. discovers the ancient city before HYDRA, but uncovering the secrets may require one of Coulson's team to make the ultimate sacrifice. Meanwhile, Melinda May and Skye race to get to Raina before Daniel Whitehall takes her.

episodes.name: What They Become
episodes.overview: Coulson and Whitehall's forces meet in an explosive confrontation that dramatically alters everyone's fates. Meanwhile, Skye discovers shocking secrets about her past.

units.title: Jessica Jones (Season 1)
units.overview: After a tragic ending to her short-lived super hero stint, Jessica Jones is rebuilding her personal life and career as a detective who gets pulled into cases involving people with extraordinary abilities in New York City.

episodes.name: AKA Ladies Night
episodes.overview: Jessica Jones is hired to find a pretty NYU student who's vanished, but it turns out to be more than a simple missing persons case.

episodes.name: AKA Crush Syndrome
episodes.overview: Jessica vows to prove Hope's innocence, even though it means tracking down a terrifying figure from her own past.

episodes.name: AKA It's Called Whiskey
episodes.overview: It won't be easy to acquire or deploy, but Jessica thinks she's found a weapon to use against Kilgrave. Luke and Jessica bond over their similarities.

episodes.name: AKA 99 Friends
episodes.overview: A new case demands attention as Jessica tries to find out who's spying on her for Kilgrave. Trish's radio show yields unexpected consequences.

episodes.name: AKA The Sandwich Saved Me
episodes.overview: Despite Jessica's objections, Trish's new friend Simpson gets involved in the hunt for Kilgrave. Jessica recalls a pivotal moment in her life.

episodes.name: AKA You're a Winner!
episodes.overview: Luke hires Jessica to help him find someone who may have skipped town, but she fears he'll learn too much about her history in the process.

episodes.name: AKA Top Shelf Perverts
episodes.overview: Malcolm, Simpson and Trish go rogue to prevent Jessica from carrying out an extreme plan to outwit Kilgrave.

episodes.name: AKA WWJD?
episodes.overview: Jessica experiences a strange homecoming courtesy of Kilgrave. Hograth's conflict with her estranged wife reaches a tipping point.

episodes.name: AKA Sin Bin
episodes.overview: Just when Jessica has Kilgrave right where she want's him, Hogarth's involvement complicates the situation. Details of Kilgrave's past emerge.

episodes.name: AKA 1,000 Cuts
episodes.overview: A discovery has the potential to change the entire game - if Jessica can refuse Kilgrave's offer.

episodes.name: AKA I've Got the Blues
episodes.overview: Jessica searches morgues for clues. Trish goes all out to keep Simpson from getting in Jessica's way. Malcolm has an epiphany.

episodes.name: AKA Take a Bloody Number
episodes.overview: The hunt for Kilgrave reunites Jessica with Luke. Trish receives some unexpected information about Simpson and Jessica.

episodes.name: AKA Smile
episodes.overview: Jessica and Luke get help from someone else in the neighborhood. Kilgrave gears up for a major test of powers against Jessica.

units.title: Agents of S.H.I.E.L.D. · S2 · E11–19
units.overview: Agent Phil Coulson of S.H.I.E.L.D. (Strategic Homeland Intervention, Enforcement and Logistics Division) puts together a team of agents to investigate the new, the strange and the unknown around the globe, protecting the ordinary from the extraordinary.

episodes.name: Aftershocks
episodes.overview: Coulson's team must deal with the consequences of their war with HYDRA as shocking revelations threaten to tear them apart, and HYDRA makes a dangerous move that may involve a traitor in S.H.I.E.L.D.'s midst.

episodes.name: Who You Really Are
episodes.overview: Coulson and his team come to the aid of a confused Lady Sif, who has lost her memory after fighting with a mysterious warrior whose mission will send shockwaves through S.H.I.E.L.D. Meanwhile, Bobbi and Mack continue to hide their true mission from everyone close to them.

episodes.name: One of Us
episodes.overview: Cal seeks revenge on Coulson by assembling a team of Super Villains to destroy S.H.I.E.L.D. Meanwhile, May calls on renowned Dr. Andrew Garner, her charismatic ex-husband, with a crisis that threatens to tear the team apart.

episodes.name: Love in the Time of Hydra
episodes.overview: Coulson and his team are still reeling from a shocking revelation that leaves the team fractured as they must decide what to do with one of their own. Meanwhile, Bobbi and Mack reveal their true allegiance to Hunter, while elsewhere, Ward and Agent 33 embark on a personal mission.

episodes.name: One Door Closes
episodes.overview: War comes to Coulson's doorstep in a way he never anticipated as shocking revelations are brought to light, and Skye struggles to control her new abilities but will soon make a decision that irrevocably changes her life.

episodes.name: Afterlife
episodes.overview: As Robert Gonzales makes his move, Coulson must do whatever it takes to protect the future of S.H.I.E.L.D. Meanwhile Skye’s journey to control her powers takes a surprising turn when she meets the enigmatic Inhuman named Lincoln.

episodes.name: Melinda
episodes.overview: The story of Melinda May’s transformation into “The Cavalry” is revealed as she finds herself at a crossroads in the war between Coulson and Gonzales. As Skye learns more about her true heritage from Lincoln, the truth about the Inhumans will send her in a new direction.

episodes.name: The Frenemy of My Enemy
episodes.overview: A dangerous new alliance is formed as Coulson and Hunter turn to the last person anyone would expect – Grant Ward! As the war between S.H.I.E.L.D. factions continues, Skye and Lincoln will find themselves drawn into this conflict.

episodes.name: The Dirty Half Dozen
episodes.overview: Gonzales and Coulson must find a way to put their differences aside and work together against HYDRA, even if it means teaming up with someone they don't trust.

units.title: Avengers: Age of Ultron
units.overview: When Tony Stark tries to jumpstart a dormant peacekeeping program, things go awry and Earth’s Mightiest Heroes are put to the ultimate test as the fate of the planet hangs in the balance. As the villainous Ultron emerges, it is up to The Avengers to stop him from enacting his terrible plans, and soon uneasy alliances and unexpected action pave the way for an epic and unique global adventure.

units.title: Agents of S.H.I.E.L.D. · S2 · E20–22
units.overview: Agent Phil Coulson of S.H.I.E.L.D. (Strategic Homeland Intervention, Enforcement and Logistics Division) puts together a team of agents to investigate the new, the strange and the unknown around the globe, protecting the ordinary from the extraordinary.

episodes.name: Scars
episodes.overview: Skye is torn between her loyalty to S.H.I.E.L.D. and her connection to the Inhumans as tensions rise between the groups -- and Coulson reveals a secret he's been hiding from even those closest to him.

episodes.name: S.O.S. (1)
episodes.overview: S.H.I.E.L.D. puts everything on the line to survive a war that blurs the line between friend and foe. Coulson and his team will be forced to make shocking sacrifices that will leave their relationships and their world changed forever.

episodes.name: S.O.S. (2)
episodes.overview: S.H.I.E.L.D. puts everything on the line to survive a war that blurs the line between friend and foe. Coulson and his team will be forced to make shocking sacrifices that will leave their relationships and their world changed forever.

units.title: Ant-Man
units.overview: Armed with the astonishing ability to shrink in scale but increase in strength, master thief Scott Lang must embrace his inner-hero and help his mentor, Doctor Hank Pym, protect the secret behind his spectacular Ant-Man suit from a new generation of towering threats. Against seemingly insurmountable obstacles, Pym and Lang must plan and pull off a heist that will save the world.

units.title: Daredevil (Season 2)
units.overview: Lawyer-by-day Matt Murdock uses his heightened senses from being blinded as a young boy to fight crime at night on the streets of Hell’s Kitchen as Daredevil.

episodes.name: Bang
episodes.overview: Hell's Kitchen has calmed, but it's not out of the fire yet. When an unknown vigilante begins to take the fight to the streets in a big and bloody way, Matt Murdock must don the mask of Daredevil to stop him before innocent people end up in the crossfire.

episodes.name: Dogs to a Gunfight
episodes.overview: As Murdock recovers from an attack, Foggy and Karen fight to protect their new client from both the law and the Kitchen's newest vigilante.

episodes.name: New York's Finest
episodes.overview: Trapped face-to-face with the Punisher, Daredevil wrestles with the morality of vigilante justice. Meanwhile, Foggy and Karen work to save the firm.

episodes.name: Penny and Dime
episodes.overview: Karen uncovers shocking facts about the Punisher, who finds himself hunted by a powerful force in Hell's Kitchen. Daredevil ponders his next moves.

episodes.name: Kinbaku
episodes.overview: A former lover arrives in Hell's Kitchen and turns Murdock's world upside down. Karen digs for the truth about the Punisher.

episodes.name: Regrets Only
episodes.overview: A lethal foe returns with a vengeance, Foggy and Murdock risk the firm to ensure justice, and Karen sees a different side of the Punisher.

episodes.name: Semper Fidelis
episodes.overview: Murdock and Foggy take on the DA in the trial of the century, but their client refuses to play along. Murdock struggles to balance his dual identities.

episodes.name: Guilty as Sin
episodes.overview: As the firm's trial spins out of control, a figure from Murdock's past returns to deliver shocking revelations about the future of Hell's Kitchen.

episodes.name: Seven Minutes in Heaven
episodes.overview: Castle gets an offer he can't refuse. Foggy and Murdock question the future of their firm, but Karen won't give up so easily.

episodes.name: The Man in the Box
episodes.overview: Murdock and Foggy get caught in the crossfire of the Punisher's revenge. Karen and Murdock dig for the truth in very different ways.
The Punisher's war continues, and so does the body count in Hell's Kitchen. Murdock tries to finish what the DA started.

episodes.name: The Dark at the End of the Tunnel
episodes.overview: Daredevil goes underground to save an old friend. Karen follows a dangerous lead. The law firm of Nelson and Murdock may have reached its final chapter.

episodes.name: A Cold Day in Hell's Kitchen
episodes.overview: In the season finale, Daredevil is backed into the ultimate showdown for his own life - and the future of Hell's Kitchen.

units.title: Luke Cage (Season 1)
units.overview: Given superstrength and durability by a sabotaged experiment, a wrongly accused man escapes prison to become a superhero for hire.

episodes.name: Moment of Truth
episodes.overview: With tension building in the streets of Harlem thanks to ruthless club owner Cottonmouth, Luke finds it increasingly difficult to live a quiet life.

episodes.name: Code of the Streets
episodes.overview: Luke is pulled deeper into the fight for his neighborhood when, as a favor to an old friend, he tries to help a kid who's in trouble with Cottonmouth.

episodes.name: Who's Gonna Take the Weight?
episodes.overview: In the aftermath of a chaotic event at a favorite Harlem hangout, Luke heeds the call to action -- and hits Cottonmouth where he'll feel it most.

episodes.name: Step in the Arena
episodes.overview: As he rescues a victim of Cottonmouth's vengeance, Luke remembers his earlier life and the conspiracy that led to his superhuman strength.

episodes.name: Just to Get a Rep
episodes.overview: Cottonmouth strikes back at Luke by taking his vengeance out on the people of Harlem, while detectives Knight and Scarfe face an unexpected threat.

episodes.name: Suckas Need Bodyguards
episodes.overview: After Cottonmouth and Scarfe's bloody clash, Luke realizes that saving the community may turn former allies into enemies, and enemies into allies.

episodes.name: Manifest
episodes.overview: Mariah's political career comes under fire, and Cottonmouth picks up information that could put Luke on the run.

episodes.name: Blowin' Up the Spot
episodes.overview: Mariah campaigns to turn the city and the police against Luke, and not even Misty or Claire may be able to save him.

episodes.name: DWYCK
episodes.overview: With Luke wounded and on the run, Misty faces a soul-searching interrogation. Mariah's rise to power takes a dark turn.

episodes.name: Take It Personal
episodes.overview: Luke gets closer to the truth about Reva and her part in his fate, while Mariah wrestles with the morality of her new role. Misty hunts for Luke.

episodes.name: Now You're Mine
episodes.overview: In one bold move, a friend from his past puts Luke on the defensive, Misty in dire straits, and Harlem's safety in jeopardy.

episodes.name: Soliloquy of Chaos
episodes.overview: Misty digs deeper for the truth as the neighborhood's power players throw the city into confusion.

episodes.name: You Know My Steez
episodes.overview: With all of Harlem bearing witness, Luke takes on the fight of his life in hopes of emerging as the defender his city needs.

units.title: Agents of S.H.I.E.L.D. · S3 · E1–10
units.overview: Agent Phil Coulson of S.H.I.E.L.D. (Strategic Homeland Intervention, Enforcement and Logistics Division) puts together a team of agents to investigate the new, the strange and the unknown around the globe, protecting the ordinary from the extraordinary.

episodes.name: Laws of Nature
episodes.overview: When a new Inhuman is discovered, Coulson and the team have an encounter with another organization seeking powered people; Fitz goes to extreme measures to determine how to get Simmons back.

episodes.name: Purpose in the Machine
episodes.overview: Fitz and the team enlist the aid of an Asgardian to unlock the secrets of the ancient Monolith that swallowed Simmons, and Agent May is at a crossroads in her personal and professional life.

episodes.name: A Wanted (Inhu)man
episodes.overview: Daisy, Mack and Coulson race to protect Lincoln as Rosalind’s team hunts down the Inhuman in their quest for powered people. Meanwhile, Hunter proves that there is no line that he will not cross to exact his revenge against Ward and HYDRA.

episodes.name: Devils You Know
episodes.overview: Coulson and the team search for the Inhuman who is killing other Inhumans. Meanwhile, May feels that Hunter's mission to take down Ward is getting too personal.

episodes.name: 4,722 Hours
episodes.overview: After her dramatic rescue from another planet, Simmons is still reeling from her ordeal and reveals how she had to fight for her life in a harsh new world.

episodes.name: Among Us Hide...
episodes.overview: The stakes get even higher as Hunter and May continue to go after Ward and HYDRA, and Daisy and Coulson begin to suspect that the ATCU may be keeping a big secret from S.H.I.E.L.D.

episodes.name: Chaos Theory
episodes.overview: As Daisy and the team fight to protect Inhumans, S.H.I.E.L.D. discovers the shocking truth about one of their foes; Fitz helps Simmons recover information that could lead them back through the portal.

episodes.name: Many Heads, One Tale
episodes.overview: The S.H.I.E.L.D. team discovers dangerous truths about the ATCU, and Ward's plans to destroy S.H.I.E.L.D. take a surprising twist.

episodes.name: Closure
episodes.overview: Ward's campaign for revenge brings the S.H.I.E.L.D. team to their knees, and Coulson proves he will do anything to settle the score.

episodes.name: Maveth
episodes.overview: S.H.I.E.L.D battles HYDRA head-to-head, which sees Coulson and Fitz take the ultimate risk while Daisy and the Inhumans try to keep HYDRA at bay.

units.title: Agents of S.H.I.E.L.D. · S3 · E11–19
units.overview: Agent Phil Coulson of S.H.I.E.L.D. (Strategic Homeland Intervention, Enforcement and Logistics Division) puts together a team of agents to investigate the new, the strange and the unknown around the globe, protecting the ordinary from the extraordinary.

episodes.name: Bouncing Back
episodes.overview: In the aftermath of his trip to Maveth, Coulson is more determined than ever to get to Gideon Malick and put an end to HYDRA once and for all. Daisy and the team encounter more Inhumans who have powers like they've never seen before, but will they be friends or enemies of S.H.I.E.L.D.?

episodes.name: The Inside Man
episodes.overview: Coulson and General Talbot are forced to team up and attend a worldwide symposium on Inhumans, where they suspect Malick has an inside man. As the S.H.I.E.L.D. team gets closer to the truth, an unexpected traitor is revealed.

episodes.name: Parting Shot
episodes.overview: Bobbi and Hunter become ensnared in an assassination plot after tracking Malick to Russia. As S.H.I.E.L.D. races to save the lives on the line, the team is changed forever.

episodes.name: Watchdogs
episodes.overview: When a radical group called The Watchdogs emerges with plans to eliminate the Inhumans, Agent Mack and his brother become caught in the crossfire. Meanwhile, Simmons discovers a powerful chemical compound that could alter the future for Inhumans.

episodes.name: Spacetime
episodes.overview: When Daisy gets a horrifying glimpse of the future, S.H.I.E.L.D. races to prove that fate is not fixed.

episodes.name: Paradise Lost
episodes.overview: S.H.I.E.L.D. hunts for information on their dangerous new enemy, and a shameful secret from Malick's past is exposed, threatening to destroy his HYDRA legacy.

episodes.name: The Team
episodes.overview: Agent Daisy Johnson must call upon the Secret Warriors for an inaugural mission that will leave no member unscathed, and S.H.I.E.L.D. learns more about Hive's powers, forcing them to question everyone they trust.

episodes.name: The Singularity
episodes.overview: The S.H.I.E.L.D. team is left reeling and decimated as Hive continues to sway Inhumans to his side. But there is a sliver of hope as Agents Fitz and Simmons follow a lead that may be able to stop the maniacal Inhuman once and for all.

episodes.name: Failed Experiments
episodes.overview: Coulson and his team race to combat Hive's control over the Inhumans, as their enemy's deadly plan for the human race is revealed.

units.title: Iron Fist (Season 1)
units.overview: Danny Rand resurfaces 15 years after being presumed dead. Now, with the power of the Iron Fist, he seeks to reclaim his past and fulfill his destiny.

episodes.name: Snow Gives Way
episodes.overview: After being declared dead 15 years earlier, Danny Rand returns to New York. But his welcome is a far cry from what he'd hoped.

episodes.name: Shadow Hawk Takes Flight
episodes.overview: Danny struggles with his new surroundings, Colleen dishes out a harsh lesson, and Joy sends an unconventional message.

episodes.name: Rolling Thunder Cannon Punch
episodes.overview: Joy proves herself a shrewd businessperson, Danny recalls a painful memory, and Colleen puts her talents to good use.

episodes.name: Eight Diagram Dragon Palm
episodes.overview: Danny makes a shocking discovery and a radical pricing proposal. Colleen's extracurricular activities goes viral, and Ward issues a stern warning.

episodes.name: Under Leaf Pluck Lotus
episodes.overview: An insidious new drug hits New York. Danny recruits Colleen for the fight, and Claire discovers that credit cards can have many uses.

episodes.name: Immortal Emerges from Cave
episodes.overview: Danny receives an invitation like no other. Colleen and Claire face a difficult choice. A worried Joy confronts her brother.

episodes.name: Felling Tree with Roots
episodes.overview: Ward's loyalty is tested. Danny discovers a rogue division, and the mysterious Bakuto visits Colleen's dojo unannounced.

episodes.name: The Blessing of Many Fractures
episodes.overview: Danny faces his fear, and Colleen meets her match. Joy makes a hasty decision while Ward struggles to accept his sister's admiration.

episodes.name: The Mistress of All Agonies
episodes.overview: Madame Gao plays mind games. Ward's old habits catch up with him, and Danny discovers that he still has much to learn about being the Iron Fist.

episodes.name: Black Tiger Steals Heart
episodes.overview: Exhausted from fighting, Danny tries to recharge with Bakuto's help. Meanwhile, Rand's management gets another shakeup.

episodes.name: Lead Horse Back to Stable
episodes.overview: Claire uses her improvisational skills, and Colleen gets conflicting information. Danny yearns to be more than just a destroyer.

episodes.name: Bar the Big Boss
episodes.overview: Ward receives an offer with strings attached. Davos advocates for an extreme solution, and a deadly duel gets personal.

episodes.name: Dragon Plays with Fire
episodes.overview: In a desperate search to clear his name, Danny learns a terrible truth that places him on a new path.

units.title: The Defenders
units.overview: Daredevil, Jessica Jones, Luke Cage and Iron Fist join forces to take on common enemies as a sinister conspiracy threatens New York City.

episodes.name: The H Word
episodes.overview: Matt Murdock, Jessica Jones, Luke Cage and Danny Rand investigate criminals and fight injustice, unaware their paths are about to cross.

episodes.name: Mean Right Hook
episodes.overview: As a new conspiracy takes shape, Matt finds old habits are hard to break, Jessica gets in over her head, Luke tracks a lead, and Danny meets his match.

episodes.name: Worst Behavior
episodes.overview: Elektra's secrets are revealed. Danny changes his tactics. Matt gives Jessica some legal advice. Luke searches for the White Hat.

episodes.name: Royal Dragon
episodes.overview: As the Defenders get to know each other over dinner, they're greeted by a series of party crashers -- none of them friendly.

episodes.name: Take Shelter
episodes.overview: Elektra's loyalties are questioned, Colleen clashes with an old acquaintance, and Luke proves he knows how to take a hit.

episodes.name: Ashes, Ashes
episodes.overview: Stick offers up a theory, Danny finds himself sidelined, and Alexandra learns that it's not easy being the leader.

episodes.name: Fish in the Jailhouse
episodes.overview: Matt, Jessica and Luke embark on a desperate search. Colleen and Claire debate heroism. Elektra tries to recruit an all-important ally.

episodes.name: The Defenders
episodes.overview: As New York edges closer to disaster, Elektra sees what's beyond the wall, and the Defenders make a last-ditch effort to save the city.

units.title: Captain America: Civil War
units.overview: Following the events of Age of Ultron, the collective governments of the world pass an act designed to regulate all superhuman activity. This polarizes opinion amongst the Avengers, causing two factions to side with Iron Man or Captain America, which causes an epic battle between former allies.

units.title: One-Shot: Team Thor: Part 1
units.overview: Discover what Thor was up to during the events of Captain America: Civil War.

units.title: One-Shot: Team Thor: Part 2
units.overview: A continuation of the documentary spoof of what Thor and his roommate Darryl were up to during the events of "Captain America: Civil War". While Cap and Iron Man duke it out, Thor tries to pay Darryl his rent in Asgardian coins.

units.title: Black Widow
units.overview: Natasha Romanoff, also known as Black Widow, confronts the darker parts of her ledger when a dangerous conspiracy with ties to her past arises. Pursued by a force that will stop at nothing to bring her down, Natasha must deal with her history as a spy and the broken relationships left in her wake long before she became an Avenger.
units.note: Watch the credits scene only after Avengers: Endgame.

units.title: Agents of S.H.I.E.L.D. · S3 · E20–22
units.overview: Agent Phil Coulson of S.H.I.E.L.D. (Strategic Homeland Intervention, Enforcement and Logistics Division) puts together a team of agents to investigate the new, the strange and the unknown around the globe, protecting the ordinary from the extraordinary.

episodes.name: Emancipation
episodes.overview: In the aftermath of the events of Captain America: Civil War, S.H.I.E.L.D. feels pressure to reveal their involvement with Inhumans. But with the stakes higher than ever and Hive growing stronger, the team is tested in ways they could never anticipate.

episodes.name: Absolution (1)
episodes.overview: S.H.I.E.L.D. takes on Hive, and when his master plan is finally revealed, the team must spring into action.

episodes.name: Ascension (2)
episodes.overview: As Hive prepares to convert the world into his personal army, S.H.I.E.L.D. scrambles to mount a counteroffensive. Who's going to pay the ultimate price to ensure that the mission is a success?

units.title: Agents of S.H.I.E.L.D. · S4 · E1–6
units.overview: Agent Phil Coulson of S.H.I.E.L.D. (Strategic Homeland Intervention, Enforcement and Logistics Division) puts together a team of agents to investigate the new, the strange and the unknown around the globe, protecting the ordinary from the extraordinary.

episodes.name: The Ghost
episodes.overview: Daisy has left S.H.I.E.L.D. and is trying to solve the mystery of a bunch of serial killings in the Los Angeles area. At the same time her old friends suspect her for the killings and are following her trail in an attempt to find her.

episodes.name: Meet the New Boss
episodes.overview: Daisy goes to battle Ghost Rider at a terrible cost, and Coulson faces the new Director, and his bold agenda surprises them all.

episodes.name: Uprising
episodes.overview: As Coulson, Mack and Fitz attempt to track down and neutralize a rogue group looking to end Inhuman Registration worldwide, Simmons and Dr. Radcliffe only have hours to save May before she succumbs forever to her mysterious illness.

episodes.name: Let Me Stand Next to Your Fire
episodes.overview: As Ghost Rider's quest for vengeance brings him into an explosive confrontation with S.H.I.E.L.D., Coulson and Mack must rely on an unlikely ally in their time of desperate need; and Daisy reunites with a familiar face to stop the Watchdogs.

episodes.name: Lockup
episodes.overview: As Robbie Reyes struggles to control the Ghost Rider, S.H.I.E.L.D. infiltrates a high-security prison to unravel the secrets that haunt them all.

episodes.name: The Good Samaritan
episodes.overview: Robbie's shocking story on how he became Ghost Rider is finally discovered as Coulson and his team's lives hang in the balance.

units.title: Black Panther
units.overview: King T'Challa returns home to the reclusive, technologically advanced African nation of Wakanda to serve as his country's new leader. However, T'Challa soon finds that he is challenged for the throne by factions within his own country as well as without. Using powers reserved to Wakandan kings, T'Challa assumes the Black Panther mantle to join with ex-girlfriend Nakia, the queen-mother, his princess-kid sister, members of the Dora Milaje (the Wakandan 'special forces') and an American secret agent, to prevent Wakanda from being dragged into a world war.

units.title: Agents of S.H.I.E.L.D. · S4 · E7–22 (+ Slingshot)
units.overview: Agent Phil Coulson of S.H.I.E.L.D. (Strategic Homeland Intervention, Enforcement and Logistics Division) puts together a team of agents to investigate the new, the strange and the unknown around the globe, protecting the ordinary from the extraordinary.

episodes.name: Deals with Our Devils
episodes.overview: With the loss of half the team, the remaining members search for answers as the clock counts down for Ghost Rider.

episodes.name: The Laws of Inferno Dynamics
episodes.overview: S.H.I.E.L.D. and Ghost Rider find themselves unlikely allies when the lives of all of Los Angeles hang in the balance.

episodes.name: Broken Promises
episodes.overview: Coulson is unaware of a dark secret May is hiding, even as the two grow closer; Aida is determined to find the Darkhold.

episodes.name: The Patriot
episodes.overview: Separated from their team, Coulson and Mack discover a shocking secret about Mace, leaving all of S.H.I.E.L.D. in a precarious position.

episodes.name: Wake Up
episodes.overview: May works to uncover the truth about what happened to her; Aida's next move puts everyone's life at risk.

episodes.name: Hot Potato Soup
episodes.overview: Agents Sam and Billy Koenig are hunted down to get at the Darkhold book, and only Phil Coulson and the team can save them before the clock ticks out.

episodes.name: BOOM
episodes.overview: Daisy, Director Mace and the S.H.I.E.L.D. team must find a way to contain an explosive Inhuman. Meanwhile, Coulson and Mack come face-to-face with Radcliffe’s inspiration for Aida.

episodes.name: The Man Behind the Shield
episodes.overview: Mace fights for his life while Coulson and team find themselves in a deadly cat-and-mouse game as they attempt his rescue.

episodes.name: Self Control
episodes.overview: Suspicion turns to paranoia when the team doesn't know who can be trusted as more LMDs infiltrate S.H.I.E.L.D.

episodes.name: What If...
episodes.overview: Daisy and Simmons uncover secrets and lies in a world gone mad. With HYDRA in control, they are our only hope to save everyone.

episodes.name: Identity and Change
episodes.overview: As Daisy and Simmons struggle to discover an escape route to the real world, the identity of the Inhuman leader of the Resistance is revealed.

episodes.name: No Regrets
episodes.overview: The truth behind Fitz's turn could bring down all of S.H.I.E.L.D..

episodes.name: All the Madame's Men
episodes.overview: Daisy finds herself teamed up with an unlikely partner. Meanwhile, Aida prepares to put her ultimate end game into effect.

episodes.name: Farewell, Cruel World!
episodes.overview: The clock is ticking for Daisy and Simmons to get the team out of the Framework, but not everyone is ready and willing to leave.

episodes.name: The Return
episodes.overview: Coulson and the team's victory in the Framework is short-lived, as an even deadlier enemy looms against them all.

episodes.name: World's End
episodes.overview: With the surprising emergence of Ghost Rider, Coulson and the team attempt to stop Aida from ending the world.

units.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
units.overview: Following the events of Captain America: Civil War, Peter Parker, with the help of his mentor Tony Stark, tries to balance his life as an ordinary high school student in Queens, New York City, with fighting crime as his superhero alter ego Spider-Man as a new threat, the Vulture, emerges.

units.title: The Punisher (Season 1)
units.overview: A former Marine out to punish the criminals responsible for his family's murder finds himself ensnared in a military conspiracy.

episodes.name: 3AM
episodes.overview: Former Marine Frank Castle takes the law into his own hands while struggling to come to terms with his traumatic past.

episodes.name: Two Dead Men
episodes.overview: A mysterious phone call forces Frank's hand. Meanwhile, Madani goes digging for suspects and Curtis delivers a message.

episodes.name: Kandahar
episodes.overview: Frank skips the subtlety while interrogating Micro. Brutal memories of top-secret missions shed light on Frank's past.

episodes.name: Resupply
episodes.overview: Madani and Sam plan a delicate operation, Curtis tries to connect with Lewis, and Frank encourages Micro to get his hands dirty.

episodes.name: Gunner
episodes.overview: Frank and Micro go looking for answers from a reluctant witness. Madani and Sam learn of a looming investigation. Rawlins sees a ghost.

episodes.name: The Judas Goat
episodes.overview: With Frank in bad shape, Micro calls on Curtis for help. Madani and Russo continue to mix business with pleasure. Lewis stands up for his rights.

episodes.name: Crosshairs
episodes.overview: Lewis struggles with the ramifications of his actions. Frank and Micro pursue another face from the past. Madani and Sam go bug hunting.

episodes.name: Cold Steel
episodes.overview: Russo opens up to Madani about his past, Sarah shares her concerns about her son with Frank, and a decoy operation takes a turn.

episodes.name: Front Toward Enemy
episodes.overview: Following a deadly explosion, Karen lands in a bomber's crosshairs -- and Frank isn't happy about it. Meanwhile, Curtis makes a grisly discovery.

episodes.name: Virtue of the Vicious
episodes.overview: An attack on a high-profile politician is examined (and reexamined) through different perspectives. Madani faces a painful truth.

episodes.name: Danger Close
episodes.overview: As danger knocks on Sarah's door, Frank takes his quest for vengeance to the next level with some help from an unexpected ally.

episodes.name: Home
episodes.overview: Frank makes a damning confession. A shootout leaves Sarah wondering what to believe. Rawlins goes in for the kill, once and for all.

episodes.name: Memento Mori
episodes.overview: As the authorities close in, an exhausted but unbroken Frank vows to put an end to the war that has consumed his life.

units.title: Doctor Strange
units.overview: After his career is destroyed, a brilliant but arrogant surgeon gets a new lease on life when a sorcerer takes him under her wing and trains him to defend the world against evil.

units.title: Jessica Jones (Season 2)
units.overview: After a tragic ending to her short-lived super hero stint, Jessica Jones is rebuilding her personal life and career as a detective who gets pulled into cases involving people with extraordinary abilities in New York City.

episodes.name: AKA Start at the Beginning
episodes.overview: While Jessica deals with a rival PI and a paranoid would-be client, Trish digs up a medical file that could unlock the mystery of Jessica's powers.

episodes.name: AKA Freak Accident
episodes.overview: Jessica sets out to find Dr. Kozlov and makes a startling discovery. Trish recruits Malcolm for backup as she visits a figure from her past.

episodes.name: AKA Sole Survivor
episodes.overview: As her visions intensify, Jessica visits an abandoned clinic, where she stumbles on a new lead. Jeri faces an ultimatum after her secret gets out.

episodes.name: AKA God Help the Hobo
episodes.overview: Between anger management classes and tabloid scandals, Jessica and Trish track down a third patient linked to IGH. Oscar extends an olive branch.

episodes.name: AKA The Octopus
episodes.overview: Backed into a corner, Jessica's forced to share her intel on the killer. A groggy Trish tries to pull herself together before an important meeting.

episodes.name: AKA Facetime
episodes.overview: Jessica gate-crashes an exclusive country club on the hunt for the killer, and Trish's new addiction begins to spiral out of control.

episodes.name: AKA I Want Your Cray Cray
episodes.overview: Flashbacks shed new light on the aftermath of the family's car accident and reveal a painful turning point in Jessica's adult life.

episodes.name: AKA Ain't We Got Fun
episodes.overview: While Jessica debates her next move, Malcolm confronts Trish about her erratic behavior, and Jeri makes contact with a healer.

episodes.name: AKA Shark in the Bathtub, Monster in the Bed
episodes.overview: The shooting forces Jessica to rethink her plans. Meanwhile, Oscar asks for help with a family crisis, and Trish's frustrations finally boil over.

episodes.name: AKA Pork Chop
episodes.overview: Jeri finagles a deal for her new client in exchange for Karl's location. Trish forges ahead with her own investigation. A prison guard crosses a line.

episodes.name: AKA Three Lives and Counting
episodes.overview: Shocked by her own actions and haunted by visions of Kilgrave, Jessica worries she's turning into a monster. Trish's plans for Karl become clear.

episodes.name: AKA Pray for My Patsy
episodes.overview: As Jessica and Dorothy wait anxiously for updates on Trish, a call from Costa brings alarming news. Jeri hatches a plan to get her revenge.

episodes.name: AKA Playland
episodes.overview: Waking up in unfamiliar surroundings, Jessica once again finds herself torn between two worlds and facing an impossible choice.

units.title: Luke Cage (Season 2)
units.overview: Given superstrength and durability by a sabotaged experiment, a wrongly accused man escapes prison to become a superhero for hire.

episodes.name: Soul Brother #1
episodes.overview: As Luke adjusts to his growing fame and tries to shut down the flow of heroin branded with his name, someone from his past reaches out.

episodes.name: Straighten It Out
episodes.overview: Luke tests out his abilities on the ballfield, Misty ruffles feathers at the precinct, and Mariah plans a reunion to boost her image.

episodes.name: Wig Out
episodes.overview: Worried Luke is headed down a dark path, Claire pays a visit to his father. Bushmaster makes a bid for Mariah's guns.

episodes.name: I Get Physical
episodes.overview: As footage of his fight with Bushmaster goes viral, Luke struggles with the aftereffects and follows a trail of clues to Tilda's shop.

episodes.name: All Souled Out
episodes.overview: Desperate to drum up quick cash for a lawsuit, Luke weighs an offer from a superfan. Mariah invites Tilda to join the new family business.

episodes.name: The Basement
episodes.overview: As a wave of violence rocks Harlem, everyone races to connect the dots between Piranha, Mariah, Bushmaster and the grisly find at the clinic.

episodes.name: On and On
episodes.overview: Reeling from the showdown on the bridge, Luke teams up with Misty to find Piranha. The hunt for the snitch heats up. Bushmaster reveals his endgame.

episodes.name: If It Ain't Rough, It Ain't Right
episodes.overview: While Shades, Mariah and Misty come to terms with the previous night's events, Bushmaster searches for a way to boost his strength.

episodes.name: For Pete's Sake
episodes.overview: Hunkered down in a makeshift safe house, Luke and Misty butt heads over how to handle Mariah. Meanwhile, long-buried family secrets come to light.

episodes.name: The Main Ingredient
episodes.overview: Danny Rand insists on helping Luke hunt for Bushmaster -- the Iron Fist way. Mariah sets out to reclaim her empire. Misty pursues a traitor.

episodes.name: The Creator
episodes.overview: Shaken by Mariah's latest act, Luke combs the city for a witness. Flashbacks reveal a fateful encounter between the Stokes and McIver families.

episodes.name: Can't Front on Me
episodes.overview: Luke teams up with an unlikely ally to combat a new strain of heroin. As Shades plows ahead with his plan, a massive party draws everyone to the club.

episodes.name: They Reminisce Over You
episodes.overview: Mariah adapts to her new circumstances and goes to extremes to cover her tracks. Luke takes a new approach to protecting Harlem.

units.title: Iron Fist (Season 2)
units.overview: Danny Rand resurfaces 15 years after being presumed dead. Now, with the power of the Iron Fist, he seeks to reclaim his past and fulfill his destiny.

episodes.name: The Fury of Iron Fist
episodes.overview: While rival gangs battle for the soul of New York, Danny and Colleen cross paths with an old acquaintance. Joy embarks on a new adventure.

episodes.name: The City's Not for Burning
episodes.overview: Danny and Colleen strive to broker a badly needed peace. Ward crashes his sister's auction, and Joy plays matchmaker -- with a twist.

episodes.name: This Deadly Secret...
episodes.overview: In an effort to ease the tension between Ward and Joy, Danny and Colleen switch gears and host a dinner party. Mary delivers a warning.

episodes.name: Target: Iron Fist
episodes.overview: Joy's interrogation of Mary takes a turn. Misty gives Danny an earful. Ward extends an olive branch. Davos makes a crucial discovery.

episodes.name: Heart of the Dragon
episodes.overview: There's a new Iron Fist in town, and he's itching to make his presence felt. Meanwhile, Ward calls in a favor, and Joy considers her options.

episodes.name: The Dragon Dies at Dawn
episodes.overview: Misty and Colleen's trip to the tattoo parlor turns painful -- but not for them. As Davos crosses names off his list, Mary makes Danny an offer.

episodes.name: Morning of the Mindstorm
episodes.overview: As Danny steps up his training, Davos ramps up recruitment. Ward falls prey to old demons, and Misty butts heads with a captain.

episodes.name: Citadel on the Edge of Vengeance
episodes.overview: Joy offers Davos tips on appealing to the masses, Danny begins to understand his limits, and Mary seeks the truth about her past.

episodes.name: War Without End
episodes.overview: Facing a life-changing decision, Danny and Colleen debate their next move. Meanwhile, Davos's contempt for mercy grows stronger.

episodes.name: A Duel of Iron
episodes.overview: In the season finale, Iron Fists collide as the fate of New York City hangs in the balance.

units.title: Daredevil (Season 3)
units.overview: Lawyer-by-day Matt Murdock uses his heightened senses from being blinded as a young boy to fight crime at night on the streets of Hell’s Kitchen as Daredevil.

episodes.name: Resurrection
episodes.overview: Shattered physically and spiritually, Matt rethinks his purpose and place in Hell's Kitchen. Meanwhile, Fisk puts a plan in motion from behind bars.

episodes.name: Please
episodes.overview: Grieving for the life he's abandoned, Matt suffers a crisis of faith. Fisk makes a deal with the FBI that turns him into a target.

episodes.name: No Good Deed
episodes.overview: As Fisk moves into swanky new digs amid a public outcry, Matt wrestles with how far he's ready to go to right this wrong. Dex's aim comes into focus.

episodes.name: Blindsided
episodes.overview: While Matt infiltrates a prison to find information on the Albanians, Fisk puts Dex in his crosshairs and a fed-up Foggy goes on the offensive.

episodes.name: The Perfect Game
episodes.overview: To quell the rising backlash over his release, Fisk serves up a scapegoat to the FBI. Dex misses the mark when he runs into a woman from his past.

episodes.name: The Devil You Know
episodes.overview: Driven to the edge, Dex loses his way until he's offered a lifeline by Fisk. Matt comes to Karen for help, which she agrees to give -- on one condition.

episodes.name: Aftermath
episodes.overview: The press crucifies Daredevil after the attack on the Bulletin, and Agent Nadeem suspects the FBI paid too high a price for Fisk's cooperation.

episodes.name: Upstairs/Downstairs
episodes.overview: A desperate Dex reaches out for help, Matt forms an uneasy alliance with Agent Nadeem, and Karen concocts a dangerous plan to provoke Fisk.

episodes.name: Revelations
episodes.overview: Matt's already shaky world tilts when he learns a shocking truth. Karen runs for her life. Nadeem discovers how deep Fisk's influence runs.

episodes.name: Karen
episodes.overview: Hunted by Fisk and haunted by mistakes from her past, Karen seeks refuge at the church. Matt finally gets his shot, and Dex goes in for the kill.

episodes.name: Reunion
episodes.overview: Dex tries to run his prey to ground, Nadeem's conscience kicks in, and Fisk looks to recover a gift from Vanessa seized during his incarceration.

episodes.name: One Last Shot
episodes.overview: Fisk’s long-awaited reunion doesn't go as planned. Nelson & Murdock take on a new client who holds key information on Kingpin.

episodes.name: A New Napkin
episodes.overview: In the season finale, Matt prepares to cross the line, as Dex becomes more dangerous than ever and Fisk enacts his endgame.

units.title: Thor: Ragnarok
units.overview: Thor is imprisoned on the other side of the universe and finds himself in a race against time to get back to Asgard to stop Ragnarok, the destruction of his home-world and the end of Asgardian civilization, at the hands of a powerful new threat, the ruthless Hela.

units.title: One-Shot: Team Darryl
units.overview: Fresh off being unseated as the ruler of Sakaar, the Grandmaster makes his way to Earth to start a new life. It's been over a year since Thor left Australia and Darryl has been struggling to pay his rent. Now Darryl needs a new roommate to help make the monthly payments. Unfortunately for Darryl, the Grandmaster was the only one who answered Darryl's "Roommate Needed" ad and with no viable options, the Grandmaster moves in.

units.title: Inhumans (Season 1)
units.overview: After the Royal Family of Inhumans is splintered by a military coup, they barely escape to Hawaii where their surprising interactions with the lush world and humanity around them may prove to not only save them, but Earth itself.

episodes.name: Behold...The Inhumans
episodes.overview: After a military coup leaves the Royal Family stranded in Hawaii, they must find a way to reunite with each other and return home before their way of life is destroyed forever.

episodes.name: Those Who Would Destroy Us
episodes.overview: After a military coup leaves the Royal Family stranded in Hawaii, they must find a way to reunite with each other and return home before their way of life is destroyed forever.

episodes.name: Divide and Conquer
episodes.overview: After fleeing their home, The Inhumans desperately search for each other in the wake of Maximus’ coup. Now they must learn who they can trust on Earth.

episodes.name: Make Way For... Medusa
episodes.overview: The search for Black Bolt continues on Earth; meanwhile, Maximus makes bold moves to cement his status as the new ruler of Attilan.

episodes.name: Something Inhuman This Way Comes...
episodes.overview: On the run from Auran’s forces, Black Bolt and Medusa reluctantly work with Louise to help locate the rest of their family. Back on Attilan, Maximus’ actions change the game completely.

episodes.name: The Gentleman's Name Is Gorgon
episodes.overview: Gorgon and Karnak take on Auran and her Inhuman army with disastrous results.

episodes.name: Havoc in the Hidden Land
episodes.overview: The Royal Family returns to Attilan and comes face to face with Maximus.

episodes.name: ...And Finally: Black Bolt
episodes.overview: It’s brother versus brother as the final showdown between Black Bolt and Maximus takes an unexpected turn – one with lasting consequences for all of Inhumanity.

units.title: Runaways (Season 1)
units.overview: Every teenager thinks their parents are evil. What if you found out they actually were? Six diverse teenagers who can barely stand each other must unite against a common foe – their parents.

episodes.name: Reunion
episodes.overview: A group of six Los Angeles teens, fractured by a tragic loss, reunite only to discover that their parents may be hiding a terrible secret that turns their world upside down.

episodes.name: Rewind
episodes.overview: A retelling of 101, as seen from the parents’ perspective. Everyone’s on edge, but after tonight, should all go as planned, they won’t have to worry about their obligations again.

episodes.name: Destiny
episodes.overview: The kids are reeling following last night’s events. As an investigation begins, they discover their parents may have more to hide than they could have imagined.

episodes.name: Fifteen
episodes.overview: The parents try to find a solution to PRIDE’s problem, and the kids grapple with a new discovery that yields more questions than answers.

episodes.name: Kingdom
episodes.overview: After their not-so-fearless leader is taken, our kids spring into action. Alex discovers long-buried secrets about his dad, as the kids uncover new truths about themselves.

episodes.name: Metamorphosis
episodes.overview: During PRIDE’s gala, the kids set in motion a new plan to take down their parents for good. As the evening unfolds, everyone’s personal drama threatens to derail their plans.

episodes.name: Refraction
episodes.overview: At Atlas’ Open House, our parents and kids are thrown together following the revelations of the gala. But for one family, the school event is only the beginning of the drama.

episodes.name: Tsunami
episodes.overview: PRIDE tries desperately to clean up their latest mess without involving Jonah. But can they handle this on their own?

episodes.name: Doomsday
episodes.overview: The Runaways are feeling more fractured than ever when Molly arrives with a devastating message from her parents. Now the kids have to stop their parents before it’s too late.

episodes.name: Hostile
episodes.overview: The Runaways face off with their parents. But when Jonah arrives unexpectedly with a new game plan, the kids realize they are in over their heads.

units.title: Agents of S.H.I.E.L.D. · S5 · E1–18
units.overview: Agent Phil Coulson of S.H.I.E.L.D. (Strategic Homeland Intervention, Enforcement and Logistics Division) puts together a team of agents to investigate the new, the strange and the unknown around the globe, protecting the ordinary from the extraordinary.

episodes.name: Orientation (1)
episodes.overview: Coulson and the team find themselves stranded on a mysterious ship in outer space, and that's just the beginning of the nightmare to come.

episodes.name: Orientation (2)
episodes.overview: Coulson and the team find themselves stranded on a mysterious ship in outer space, and that's just the beginning of the nightmare to come.

episodes.name: A Life Spent
episodes.overview: Daisy decides she will rescue Simmons, even if it means risking everything to do it.

episodes.name: A Life Earned
episodes.overview: Coulson and the team discover what their captors' true intentions are, and in space, escape is not an option.

episodes.name: Rewind
episodes.overview: With the surprising help of Lance Hunter, nothing will stop Fitz from finding the lost team as his incredible journey is revealed.

episodes.name: Fun & Games
episodes.overview: With Daisy's life on the line, an unexpected friend attempts to rescue her.

episodes.name: Together or Not at All
episodes.overview: Just as the team reunites, they become prey to an undefeated Kree warrior bent on killing them all.

episodes.name: The Last Day
episodes.overview: Coulson and the team discover that the most unexpected person from S.H.I.E.L.D.’s past may hold the key to stopping Earth’s destruction.

episodes.name: Best Laid Plans
episodes.overview: Mack, Yo-Yo, and Flint fight to keep everyone alive by starting a revolution against the Kree.

episodes.name: Past Life
episodes.overview: The team has one final chance to return to the timeline, but their actions may have deadly consequences.

episodes.name: All the Comforts of Home
episodes.overview: Coulson and the team set out to rewrite the course of humanity's fate; they're unaware that their efforts will dramatically change one S.H.I.E.L.D. agent's life.

episodes.name: The Real Deal
episodes.overview: In the milestone 100th episode, Coulson finally reveals the mysterious deal he made with Ghost Rider, which will impact everyone on the team.

episodes.name: Principia
episodes.overview: The team goes in search of Gravitonium in order to save the world.

episodes.name: The Devil Complex
episodes.overview: As Fitz and Simmons race to find a way to seal the Rift, they are faced with one of their greatest fears manifested.

episodes.name: Rise and Shine
episodes.overview: Coulson uncovers General Hale's true agenda, and it could be the end of the world if S.H.I.E.L.D. doesn't help her.

episodes.name: Inside Voices
episodes.overview: Coulson is forced to team up with surprising allies to save the world, while the S.H.I.E.L.D. team attempts to track down and rescue him.

episodes.name: The Honeymoon
episodes.overview: While an agent's life hangs in the balance, Fitz, Simmons, and Yo-Yo attempt to neutralize a weapon that could play a role in Earth’s destruction.

episodes.name: All Roads Lead…
episodes.overview: The team must find a way to stop Ruby before the prophesied chain reaction that can destroy the Earth is put into motion.

units.title: Cloak & Dagger (Season 1)
units.overview: Two teenagers from very different backgrounds awaken to newly acquired superpowers which mysteriously link them to one another.

episodes.name: First Light
episodes.overview: Tandy Bowen and Tyrone Johnson – two teenagers from very different backgrounds, find themselves burdened and awakened to newly acquired superpowers which are mysteriously linked to one another. The only constant in their lives is danger and each other. Tandy can emit light daggers and Tyrone has the ability to control the power of darkness. They quickly learn they are better together than apart.

episodes.name: Suicide Sprints
episodes.overview: Tandy and Tyrone try to grasp what has happened to them with their new-found powers, while Tandy’s past catches up with her and Tyrone becomes consumed with revenge. Meanwhile, Detective Brigid O’Reilly works an interesting case that has ties to Tandy.

episodes.name: Stained Glass
episodes.overview: Tandy is on the run as Detective O’Reilly closes in on her, but the detective may not be after her for the reasons Tandy thinks. Tyrone is desperate for answers and turns to Evita and her Auntie Clarisse, a Voodoo priestess, for help.

episodes.name: Call/Response
episodes.overview: Tandy and Tyrone come face-to-face as the two are able to sit down and talk. Having not been able to tell anyone else what they have been experiencing, both take the opportunity to finally confide in the one person who may truly understand what they are going through. Meanwhile, Otis reveals a secret side of himself and Greg seems to be onto something with Melissa’s case against Roxxon.

episodes.name: Princeton Offense
episodes.overview: Tandy is consumed with getting answers about the Roxxon cover up. To get the answers she is looking for, Tandy tests out her power to gain new insights. Tyrone, on the other hand, is focusing on being a normal kid as the basketball state finals approach. With so much weighing on him lately, can he truly push everything to the side and win the big game for Billy? Meanwhile, Det. O’Reilly looks into the city’s drug problems to get some answers of her own.

episodes.name: Funhouse Mirrors
episodes.overview: Tyrone heads down a dangerous path to get closer to Det. Connors, as Tandy pretends to be a Roxxon intern in an attempt to get answers. Her “internship” hits a little too close to home for Tandy when she gets a glimpse at what her life could have been like. Meanwhile, Det. O’Reilly gets closer to Det. Connors and Evita’s Aunt Clarisse worries about Tyrone’s future.

episodes.name: Lotus Eaters
episodes.overview: A mysterious man may be the key for Tandy to finally clear her father’s name. Unfortunately, getting the answers she needs will be difficult as the man has been in a catatonic state for almost a decade, but it might not be so impossible for two people with extraordinary powers. With Tyrone alongside to help, the two test their combined powers for the first time.

episodes.name: Ghost Stories
episodes.overview: Tandy and Melissa prepare to commemorate the 8th anniversary of Nathan’s passing with their annual memorial tradition.
