When Tandy gets a key piece of information regarding her father, she uses this day to try and finally clear her father’s name. Meanwhile, Tyrone’s parents prefer not to mark the day Billy passed, but Tyrone’s need to keep Billy’s memory alive causes conflict among the three. Deciding today is the day he gets a confession out of Det. Connors, Tyrone goes to Det. O’Reilly for help.

episodes.name: Back Breaker
episodes.overview: When triumph turns sour, both Tandy and Tyrone regress back to their old ways. But after everything that has happened, and actions that have been set into motion, can they truly go back to the way things once were? Meanwhile, Det. O’Reilly tries to deal with the recent fallout.

episodes.name: Colony Collapse
episodes.overview: Everything comes to a head for Tyrone and Tandy as the city of New Orleans is thrown into chaos. The two realize that it is time they face their destiny and test their powers as “The Divine Pairing” to save the city.

units.title: Cloak & Dagger (Season 2)
units.overview: Two teenagers from very different backgrounds awaken to newly acquired superpowers which mysteriously link them to one another.

episodes.name: Restless Energy
episodes.overview: Now living very different lives, Tyrone and Tandy try to stay under the wire while still honing their powers. After coming to terms with their destiny, the two now find it difficult to just stand by and do nothing while bad things continue to happen throughout the city. Meanwhile, Brigid is struggling from her recovery.

episodes.name: White Lines
episodes.overview: Desperate to help, but only finding they cause more problems than solving them, Tyrone and Tandy continue to struggle with their situation. What is the point of having superpowers if you only seem to make things worse?

episodes.name: Shadow Selves
episodes.overview: After learning about a group of young girls who have gone missing, Tandy and Tyrone look to see if they can find out what has happened to them. As they get further into their investigation, they realize someone else is trying to rescue the girls too, but in her own vigilante justice type of way. Meanwhile, Mina may have discovered a side effect to the big Roxxon leak.

episodes.name: Rabbit Hold
episodes.overview: Still on her quest to find out more about the sex trafficking ring, Tandy takes a dangerous trip to find Mayhem, who may have the answers she is looking for. Meanwhile, Tyrone’s past actions catch up to him and put Adina in harm’s way.

episodes.name: Alignment Chart
episodes.overview: Tyrone is faced with a hard decision when presented with an opportunity to clear his name from an unlikely source. Meanwhile, Tandy is letting her anger get the best of her as she becomes frustrated with a possible dead end to her investigation into the sex trafficking ring.

episodes.name: B Sides
episodes.overview: In her quest to bring down the sex trafficking ring, Tandy finds herself in a difficult and strange situation. Not sure what is going to happen, she always has Tyrone to lean on, no matter what the circumstance.

episodes.name: Vikingtown Sound
episodes.overview: Adina is pushed to a dangerous edge as she looks to get answers and closure for her two boys. Meanwhile, Tyrone comes in contact with a mysterious figure on his search for Tandy.

episodes.name: Two Player
episodes.overview: Tandy and Evita must go to great lengths when Tyrone is put in a dangerous situation. Meanwhile, Adina looks to someone surprising for help.

episodes.name: Blue Note
episodes.overview: Tyrone and Tandy turn to questionable allies in their attempt to find and stop the villain behind the trafficking ring. Meanwhile, Tandy learns more about Lia's past.

episodes.name: Level Up
episodes.overview: Tyrone and Tandy head to the Loa dimension to stop the evil force threatening New Orleans. To finally put an end to it, they must come face to face with their own personal issues that have been holding them back.

units.title: Runaways (Season 2)
units.overview: Every teenager thinks their parents are evil. What if you found out they actually were? Six diverse teenagers who can barely stand each other must unite against a common foe – their parents.

episodes.name: Gimme Shelter
episodes.overview: The kids struggle with their new lives as Runaways, but find a hideout. Alex goes to work for Darius while PRIDE plots to kill Jonah. Jonah initiates a plan to build a new box.

episodes.name: Radio On
episodes.overview: Karolina, Nico, and Molly try to retrieve the Staff of One, but Tina puts up a fight. Karolina grows closer to Jonah while Alex and Livvie share a kiss.

episodes.name: Double Zeros
episodes.overview: Alex, comfortable in Compton and falling hard for Livvie, is betrayed. Jonah gives Leslie a mission to retrieve his DNA from the Yorkeses while Catherine exacts vengeance against Darius. Janet decodes the Abstract and Molly sneaks out to fight crime.

episodes.name: Old School
episodes.overview: Topher helps the kids break into Atlas Academy, but the plan is blown when Dale and Stacey trigger an earthquake and the parents rush to the scene. Jonah’s body continues to break down as he leads Karolina into the hole.

episodes.name: Rock Bottom
episodes.overview: When the kids discover that Topher may be more dangerous than they could have imagined, addicted to the rocks that give him superhuman abilities, will they help him or will they turn their backs on their new friend?

episodes.name: Bury Another
episodes.overview: PRIDE grapples with the moral implications of Jonah’s latest offer: freedom. Jonah, weakening, begins to eye his next target. After learning that Jonah is after another sacrifice, the Runaways realize they have to stop him before he kills another kid.

episodes.name: Last Rites
episodes.overview: It’s time for the Runaways to stop Jonah, once and for all. But while the kids scramble to stall out Jonah’s plan, the parents unexpectedly arrive. Will PRIDE fight against their own kids or join their ranks against the powerful, and vengeful, Jonah?

episodes.name: Past Life
episodes.overview: In the aftermath of the battle against Jonah, Karolina searches for answers about Jonah and the others help Alex and Livvie try to prove Darius’s innocence in Destiny’s murder. But Livvie’s curiosity just might catch up with her.

episodes.name: Big Shot
episodes.overview: The Runaways face off with PRIDE’S dirty cops, Flores and AWOL. Against all objections, Alex blackmails AWOL to help. But AWOL refuses. PRIDE resolves to take the kids by force. Back at the Hostel, Karolina hears a mysterious voice.

episodes.name: Hostile Takeover
episodes.overview: Leslie starts dismantling the cult she helped create, but Frank has other plans. AWOL uses Livvie as bait to confront the Runaways. The teens must protect Gert & Old Lace, who are sick, and AWOL’s team storms the hostel. Victor doesn’t feel like himself.

episodes.name: Last Waltz
episodes.overview: The Runaways are falling apart. Needing a break, they throw Molly a quinceanera. PRIDE ramps up their new arsenal. Frank puts Leslie in a facility to bring her back to the faith. Meanwhile, the mysterious voice Karolina has been hearing becomes real.

episodes.name: Earth Angel
episodes.overview: Angry at his betrayal, the Runaways meet with Chase. He offers them a choice: surrender to PRIDE or face the consequences. As the kids attempt their escape, they’re separated and forced to survive against an enemy far more pernicious than they expected.

episodes.name: Split Up
episodes.overview: Angry at his betrayal, the Runaways meet with Chase. He offers them a choice: surrender to PRIDE or face the consequences. As the kids attempt their escape, they’re separated and forced to survive against an enemy far more pernicious than they expected

units.title: The Punisher (Season 2)
units.overview: A former Marine out to punish the criminals responsible for his family's murder finds himself ensnared in a military conspiracy.

episodes.name: Roadhouse Blues
episodes.overview: While driving through Michigan, Frank stops for a beer at a roadside bar. But staying out of trouble has never been his strong suit.

episodes.name: Fight or Flight
episodes.overview: Frank and a reluctant Rachel go on the run as a menacing adversary gives chase. Meanwhile, Madani pays Russo an unwelcome visit.

episodes.name: Trouble the Water
episodes.overview: As Pilgrim's past comes into focus, Frank and Rachel find themselves in police custody, where they're anything but safe.

episodes.name: Scar Tissue
episodes.overview: Rachel recalls the night everything changed and lets Frank in on the truth about her name. Russo sits down with a face from his childhood.

episodes.name: One-Eyed Jacks
episodes.overview: It's not a trap if you know it's coming: That's Frank's philosophy. Madani opens up and Pilgrim plans a visit to an unholy land.

episodes.name: Nakazat
episodes.overview: Amy (formerly Rachel) develops photographs that point to a conspiracy. Russo reads his own report. Madani's story about Russo comes under fire.

episodes.name: One Bad Day
episodes.overview: Madani's quest to ID Pilgrim hits a wall. Russo and his crew put their plan into action. Frank encounters someone from the past.

episodes.name: My Brother's Keeper
episodes.overview: Painful memories take ahold of Russo. Frank's frustration frightens those closest to him. Madani receives a visitor bearing a warning.

episodes.name: Flustercluck
episodes.overview: A big bounty inspires New York's worst to pursue the Punisher. A restless Amy seeks help from a fellow grifter. Russo and Krista consider the future.

episodes.name: The Dark Hearts of Men
episodes.overview: As Madani and Krista debate who's worth saving, Frank prepares to storm Russo's territory. A brutal encounter pushes Pilgrim back into old habits.

episodes.name: The Abyss
episodes.overview: Amy rushes to protect Frank, who lies defenseless in a hospital. Pilgrim gets some crushing news, and Karen Page calls in a favor.

episodes.name: Collision Course
episodes.overview: Buckle up -- Mahoney and Frank are about to take a ride to remember. Amy makes an entrance, Russo cashes out, and Madani comes clean to Krista.

episodes.name: The Whirlwind
episodes.overview: Frank, Pilgrim, Madani, Russo, Amy, Curt and the Schultz family. No bullet is left unspent as season two comes to an explosive conclusion.

units.title: Jessica Jones (Season 3)
units.overview: After a tragic ending to her short-lived super hero stint, Jessica Jones is rebuilding her personal life and career as a detective who gets pulled into cases involving people with extraordinary abilities in New York City.

episodes.name: AKA The Perfect Burger
episodes.overview: As Jessica focuses on helping the helpless, Dorothy Walker shows up at Alias to beg for help finding a missing Trish.

episodes.name: AKA You're Welcome
episodes.overview: Tensions run high between Jessica and Trish as Trish hones her new catlike skills and scours the city for a chance to be a hero.

episodes.name: AKA I Have No Spleen
episodes.overview: Itching to get back out on the streets and find her attacker, Jessica defies her doctor's advice. Jeri reconnects with her college flame Kith.

episodes.name: AKA Customer Service is Standing By
episodes.overview: Jessica learns there's more to Erik than meets the eye as they track down three potential attackers. Malcolm digs up dirt on Kith's husband.

episodes.name: AKA I Wish
episodes.overview: Teaming up with Trish to stake out Sallinger, Jessica makes a startling discovery. Jeri's plot to expose Peter yields unexpected consequences.

episodes.name: AKA Sorry Face
episodes.overview: As the police sift through the gruesome crime scene, Jessica and Trish race to find Sallinger's latest captive.

episodes.name: AKA The Double Half-Wappinger
episodes.overview: Jessica and Trish go on a road trip to dig into Sallinger's past and unearth a horrifying discovery.

episodes.name: AKA Camera Friendly
episodes.overview: When Sallinger posts a video teasing his next crime, Jessica responds with her own media play. Jeri demands that Malcolm identify the masked woman.

episodes.name: AKA I Did Something Today
episodes.overview: After a shocking blow, Jessica's forced to choose between protecting Trish and destroying Sallinger. Jeri seizes a chance to get back in Kith's life.

episodes.name: AKA Hero Pants
episodes.overview: Jessica wrestles with her emotions as she tries to untangle herself from a murder investigation.

episodes.name: AKA Hellcat
episodes.overview: Trish revisits her troubled childhood with Dorothy while plotting to stop Sallinger and stamp out evil across the city.

episodes.name: AKA A Lotta Worms
episodes.overview: As Trish makes a move on Sallinger, Jessica intervenes -- and ends up caught in a harrowing dance with the killer.

episodes.name: AKA Everything
episodes.overview: An old friend visits Jessica as she sets out on an agonizing mission and learns the true cost of being a hero.

units.title: Ant-Man and the Wasp
units.overview: Just when his time under house arrest is about to end, Scott Lang once again puts his freedom at risk to help Hope van Dyne and Dr. Hank Pym dive into the quantum realm and try to accomplish, against time and any chance of success, a very dangerous rescue mission.
units.note: Watch the mid-credits scene only after Avengers: Infinity War.

units.title: Avengers: Infinity War
units.overview: As the Avengers and their allies have continued to protect the world from threats too large for any one hero to handle, a new danger has emerged from the cosmic shadows: Thanos. A despot of intergalactic infamy, his goal is to collect all six Infinity Stones, artifacts of unimaginable power, and use them to inflict his twisted will on all of reality. Everything the Avengers have fought for has led up to this moment - the fate of Earth and existence itself has never been more uncertain.

units.title: Agents of S.H.I.E.L.D. · S5 · E19–22
units.overview: Agent Phil Coulson of S.H.I.E.L.D. (Strategic Homeland Intervention, Enforcement and Logistics Division) puts together a team of agents to investigate the new, the strange and the unknown around the globe, protecting the ordinary from the extraordinary.

episodes.name: Option Two
episodes.overview: Coulson and the team find themselves under siege at the Lighthouse.

episodes.name: The One Who Will Save Us All
episodes.overview: A newly determined Talbot takes Coulson to meet the enemy and attempts to avert Earth's destruction.

episodes.name: The Force of Gravity
episodes.overview: Daisy's future as the Destroyer of Worlds could take a critical change.

episodes.name: The End
episodes.overview: Coulson's life or death is the challenge the team finds themselves in, as the wrong decision will cause the Destruction of Earth.

units.title: Agents of S.H.I.E.L.D. · S6
units.overview: Agent Phil Coulson of S.H.I.E.L.D. (Strategic Homeland Intervention, Enforcement and Logistics Division) puts together a team of agents to investigate the new, the strange and the unknown around the globe, protecting the ordinary from the extraordinary.

episodes.name: Missing Pieces
episodes.overview: Scattered across the galaxy, the team works to find their footing in the wake of losing Coulson.

episodes.name: Window of Opportunity
episodes.overview: While Fitz and Enoch struggle in space, Sarge and his team move forward with their mysterious mission on Earth.

episodes.name: Fear and Loathing on the Planet of Kitson
episodes.overview: It’s a wild night out on the planet of Kitson for the agents. While Leo and Enoch try their luck at the casino, nearby, Daisy and Simmons find themselves in a much... groovier situation.

episodes.name: Code Yellow
episodes.overview: Yo-Yo and Keller take things public; parasitic aliens threaten the human race; and someone really needs boba.

episodes.name: The Other Thing
episodes.overview: Sarge has May; Atarah has Daisy, Enoch and Simmons; and now, there are two planets that need saving.

episodes.name: Inescapable
episodes.overview: They've fought through space, time and alternate realities to find each other, and now, closer than ever, only their own demons can stop FitzSimmons' reunion.

episodes.name: Toldja
episodes.overview: After finding themselves in yet another gambling dilemma, a mysterious stranger offers Enoch and FitzSimmons a ride home where, it turns out, two shrikes aren’t better than one.

episodes.name: Collision Course (1)
episodes.overview: To face The Galaxy-Hopping Hate-Beast That Eats Planets, the team on Earth asks for help in all the wrong places. While back on the Lazy Comet, something weird is going on with Izel’s crew, and it’s not just the puffies.

episodes.name: Collision Course (2)
episodes.overview: No time for the team to play catch-up, there's a planet to save.

episodes.name: Leap
episodes.overview: The party’s over, and now the team must trust each other in order to face impending doom and an enemy that’s closer than they think.

episodes.name: From the Ashes
episodes.overview: Out of answers and running out of time, the agents must face the ghosts of their past in order to move forward.

episodes.name: The Sign
episodes.overview: With time running short, the team will have to go to hell and back to stop the end of everything.

episodes.name: New Life
episodes.overview: Who will survive? It all comes down to this.

units.title: Agents of S.H.I.E.L.D. · S7
units.overview: Agent Phil Coulson of S.H.I.E.L.D. (Strategic Homeland Intervention, Enforcement and Logistics Division) puts together a team of agents to investigate the new, the strange and the unknown around the globe, protecting the ordinary from the extraordinary.

episodes.name: The New Deal
episodes.overview: Coulson and the Agents of S.H.I.E.L.D. are thrust backward in time and stranded in 1931 New York City. With the all-new Zephyr set to time-jump at any moment, the team must hurry to find out exactly what happened. If they fail, it would mean disaster for the past, present and future of the world.

episodes.name: Know Your Onions
episodes.overview: With the identity of the timeline-unraveling "thread" revealed, the team's mission to protect him at all costs leads each agent to question their own values. Is preserving the future of the world as they know it worth the destruction they could prevent?

episodes.name: Alien Commies from the Future!
episodes.overview: A surprise leap forward in time has stranded Enoch in 1931 and landed the team in yet another unfamiliar decade. Now, in order to stop the Chronicoms from launching their newest future-dismantling plan, the agents will have to infiltrate one of S.H.I.E.L.D.’s most secure bases. They won’t be able to succeed without help from a familiar face or two.

episodes.name: Out of the Past
episodes.overview: It was just another average morning on July 22, 1955, when Agent Phil Coulson realized the importance of that day in the S.H.I.E.L.D. history books. With a chip on his shoulder and a genre-bending glitch in his system, he’d set into motion a chain of events that would hopefully preserve the timeline as we know it and ensure those pesky Chronicoms get the ending they deserve. What could go wrong?

episodes.name: A Trout in the Milk
episodes.overview: After a bumpy landing in the disco decade, the team – Daniel Sousa in tow – reunites with more than one familiar face at the S.H.I.E.L.D. hangout and discovers exactly how to dismantle the Chronicoms’ latest plan. But when they get too close for comfort, the Zephyr unexpectedly leaps forward again, this time to a date pivotal to not only the future of S.H.I.E.L.D. but to the future of Director Mack as well.

episodes.name: Adapt or Die
episodes.overview: The stakes are higher than ever when, after blowing their cover and damaging the Zephyr in the process, the team must scramble to rescue Mack’s parents, save S.H.I.E.L.D. from a Chronicom infestation, and fix the ship … all before the next time-jump. Meanwhile, Daisy and Sousa find themselves at a disadvantage against a power hungry Nathaniel Malick and his goons, and Coulson will have to do the thing he does best in order to save the future.

episodes.name: The Totally Excellent Adventures of Mack and The D
episodes.overview: After being unexpectedly stranded in 1982, Mack retreats to his childhood home to process the death of his parents, while Deke gets to work scouting a chart-topping group of new agents. With no idea if or when the team is coming back for them, time seems to finally be on their side … at least until the killer robots show up.

episodes.name: After, Before
episodes.overview: With the Zephyr’s time drive malfunctioning, the team is quite literally hurling toward disaster and Yo-Yo may be their only hope. The only problem? To get her powers back, she’ll need to enlist the help of an old adversary and revisit part of her past long hidden away.

episodes.name: As I Have Always Been
episodes.overview: A time storm ravages the Zephyr, propelling it toward destruction while simultaneously forcing Daisy and Coulson to relive their failed attempts to save the team over and over, until they find a solution or are swallowed by the storm. Making it to their next destination will take trust, courage and sacrifice from everyone on board, but it will all come down to having enough time.

episodes.name: Stolen
episodes.overview: After Enoch’s sacrifice propelled them out of the time storm, the team arrives back in 1983 where Nathaniel and Kora are hard at work building an army of hand-selected anarchist Inhumans at Afterlife. When the agents split up to cover more ground, Daisy is tasked with protecting Jiaying and is compelled to confront her mother for the first time since her death; while the others quickly learn they’ll need to face yet another supercharged former enemy in order to stop Malick.

episodes.name: Brand New Day
episodes.overview: With the help of Kora on the inside, Sibyl and Nathaniel continue their fight to shape a dark new future for S.H.I.E.L.D., managing to stay one step ahead of the agents along the way. If the team is going to turn this one around, they’ll have to get creative, and maybe even a little out of this world.

episodes.name: The End Is at Hand
episodes.overview: With their backs against the wall and Nathaniel and Sibyl edging ever closer to eliminating S.H.I.E.L.D. from the history books, the agents must rely on their strengths to outsmart and outlast the Chronicoms. This is their most important fight, and it will take the help of friends and teammates, past and present, to survive.

episodes.name: What We're Fighting For
episodes.overview: With their backs against the wall and Nathaniel and Sibyl edging ever closer to eliminating S.H.I.E.L.D. from the history books, the agents must rely on their strengths to outsmart and outlast the Chronicoms. This is their most important fight, and it will take the help of friends and teammates, past and present, to survive.

units.title: Runaways (Season 3)
units.overview: Every teenager thinks their parents are evil. What if you found out they actually were? Six diverse teenagers who can barely stand each other must unite against a common foe – their parents.

episodes.name: Smoke and Mirrors
episodes.overview: The Runaways spring a trap to rescue their missing friends from Jonah and his family.

episodes.name: The Great Escape
episodes.overview: Karolina, Chase and Janet plot their own escape from the Algorithm, while in the real world the rest of the Runaways team up to fight Jonah and get them out.

episodes.name: Lord of Lies
episodes.overview: The Runaways become suspicious of one another with a traitor among them. Catherine takes responsibility for her past. Leslie seeks help protecting the child growing inside her.

episodes.name: Rite of Thunder
episodes.overview: The kids search for Leslie and Alien Alex. Meanwhile, Leslie gives birth and Xavin fulfills her prophecy. The kids go head to head in a final battle against the aliens.

episodes.name: Enter the Dreamland
episodes.overview: The kids find themselves in an alternate dimension full of visions from their past. They must find their parents and Alex before time runs out. One person is left behind.

episodes.name: Merry Meet Again
episodes.overview: After being trapped in the Dark Dimension for six months, the kids must contend with the new Wizard phone craze that is sweeping the city and may hint at darker things to come.

episodes.name: Left-Hand Path
episodes.overview: The kids try to get the message out about Morgan’s phones and Molly falls for a boy while the Minorus unite as a family to steal Morgan’s most prized possession.

episodes.name: Devil's Torture Chamber
episodes.overview: Nico convinces Cloak and Dagger to take the Runaways to the Dark Dimension to save Alex, but it’s Alex who ends up saving them all.

episodes.name: The Broken Circle
episodes.overview: The remaining PRIDE members unite with the kids to foil Morgan’s plans, but as a battle rages in the Hostel, one of the Runaways pays the ultimate price to defeat her.

episodes.name: Cheat the Gallows
episodes.overview: Two years after defeating Morgan, visitors from the future send the Runaways back through time to prevent their own murders and even save a friend thought lost forever.

units.title: Avengers: Endgame
units.overview: After the devastating events of Avengers: Infinity War, the universe is in ruins due to the efforts of the Mad Titan, Thanos. With the help of remaining allies, the Avengers must assemble once more in order to undo Thanos' actions and restore order to the universe once and for all, no matter what consequences may be in store.

units.title: Loki (Season 1)
units.overview: After stealing the Tesseract during the events of “Avengers: Endgame,” an alternate version of Loki is brought to the mysterious Time Variance Authority, a bureaucratic organization that exists outside of time and space and monitors the timeline. They give Loki a choice: face being erased from existence due to being a “time variant” or help fix the timeline and stop a greater threat.

episodes.name: Glorious Purpose
episodes.overview: After stealing the Tesseract in "Avengers: Endgame," Loki lands before the Time Variance Authority.

episodes.name: The Variant
episodes.overview: Mobius puts Loki to work, but not everyone at TVA is thrilled about the God of Mischief's presence.

episodes.name: Lamentis
episodes.overview: Loki finds out The Variant's plans, but he has his own that will forever alter both their destinies.

episodes.name: The Nexus Event
episodes.overview: Frayed nerves and paranoia infiltrate the TVA as Mobius and Hunter B-15 search for Loki and Sylvie.

episodes.name: Journey into Mystery
episodes.overview: Loki tries to escape The Void, a desolate purgatory where he meets variant versions of himself.

episodes.name: For All Time. Always.
episodes.overview: The clock is ticking in the season finale which finds Loki and Sylvie on a date with destiny.

units.title: What If…? (Season 1)
units.overview: Taking inspiration from the comic books of the same name, each episode of this animated anthology series questions, revisits and twists classic Marvel Cinematic moments.

episodes.name: What If... Captain Carter Were the First Avenger?
episodes.overview: When Steve Rogers is seriously injured, Peggy Carter becomes the world’s first Super Soldier.

episodes.name: What If... T'Challa Became a Star-Lord?
episodes.overview: The rough-and-tumble space pirates known as the Ravagers abduct T’Challa instead of Peter Quill.

episodes.name: What If... The World Lost Its Mightiest Heroes?
episodes.overview: Nick Fury struggles to launch The Avengers when candidates are targeted by a serial killer.

episodes.name: What If... Doctor Strange Lost His Heart Instead of His Hands?
episodes.overview: A grief-stricken Doctor Strange uses the Eye of Agamotto in a dangerous effort to change the past.

episodes.name: What If... Zombies!?
episodes.overview: When The Avengers are infected by a zombie plague, surviving heroes search for a cure.

episodes.name: What If... Killmonger Rescued Tony Stark?
episodes.overview: An American soldier called Killmonger rescues Tony Stark when his Humvee is attacked in Afghanistan.

episodes.name: What If... Thor Were an Only Child?
episodes.overview: Thor, who never learned to be a good hero, throws an out-of-control intergalactic party on Earth.

episodes.name: What If... Ultron Won?
episodes.overview: Natasha Romanoff and Clint Barton seek to destroy killer-robot Ultron following a cataclysmic event.

episodes.name: What If... The Watcher Broke His Oath?
episodes.overview: The Watcher breaks his oath and recruits heroes from across the multiverse to battle against Ultron.

units.title: WandaVision
units.overview: Wanda Maximoff and Vision—two super-powered beings living idealized suburban lives—begin to suspect that everything is not as it seems.

episodes.name: Filmed Before a Live Studio Audience
episodes.overview: Wanda and Vision struggle to conceal their powers during dinner with Vision’s boss and his wife.

episodes.name: Don't Touch That Dial
episodes.overview: In an effort to fit in, Wanda and Vision perform a magic act in their community talent show.

episodes.name: Now in Color
episodes.overview: Wanda's pregnancy fritzes her powers as she and Vision prepare for an accelerated delivery.

episodes.name: We Interrupt This Program
episodes.overview: Monica Rambeau, tasked with a special assignment regarding sentient weapons, goes missing.

episodes.name: On a Very Special Episode...
episodes.overview: Wanda addresses Vision's worries when he grows suspicious of the neighbors' strange behavior.

episodes.name: All-New Halloween Spooktacular!
episodes.overview: Disturbances on Halloween separate Wanda from Vision, who looks into anomalous activity in Westview.

episodes.name: Breaking the Fourth Wall
episodes.overview: Monica plots her return to the anomaly while Wanda navigates a slew of unsettling complications, and Vision forms a new alliance to help.

episodes.name: Previously On
episodes.overview: Wanda embarks on a troubling journey revisiting her past for insight into her present and future.

episodes.name: The Series Finale
episodes.overview: The events of WandaVision come to a head, and the destinies of all who took part are determined.

units.title: Avengers: Endgame (Finale Revisit)
units.overview: After the devastating events of Avengers: Infinity War, the universe is in ruins due to the efforts of the Mad Titan, Thanos. With the help of remaining allies, the Avengers must assemble once more in order to undo Thanos' actions and restore order to the universe once and for all, no matter what consequences may be in store.
units.note: Resume/finish Endgame after the five-year jump. Does not count twice.

units.title: Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings
units.overview: Shang-Chi must confront the past he thought he left behind when he is drawn into the web of the mysterious Ten Rings organization.

units.title: The Falcon and the Winter Soldier
units.seriesTitle: The Falcon and the Winter Soldier
units.overview: Following the events of “Avengers: Endgame”, the Falcon, Sam Wilson and the Winter Soldier, Bucky Barnes team up in a global adventure that tests their abilities, and their patience.

episodes.name: New World Order
episodes.overview: Sam Wilson and Bucky Barnes realize that their futures are anything but normal.

episodes.name: The Star-Spangled Man
episodes.overview: John Walker is named Captain America, and Sam and Bucky team up against a rebel group.

episodes.name: Power Broker
episodes.overview: Sam and Bucky go to a criminal safe haven to find information about the Super Soldier serum.

episodes.name: The Whole World Is Watching
episodes.overview: John Walker loses patience with Sam and Bucky as they learn more about Karli Morgenthau.

episodes.name: Truth
episodes.overview: John Walker faces consequences for his actions, and Sam and Bucky return to the U.S.

episodes.name: One World, One People
episodes.overview: As The Flag Smashers escalate their efforts, Sam and Bucky take action.

units.title: Spider-Man: Far From Home
units.overview: Peter Parker and his friends go on a summer trip to Europe. However, they will hardly be able to rest - Peter will have to agree to help Nick Fury uncover the mystery of creatures that cause natural disasters and destruction throughout the continent.

units.title: Eternals
units.overview: The Eternals are a team of ancient aliens who have been living on Earth in secret for thousands of years. When an unexpected tragedy forces them out of the shadows, they are forced to reunite against mankind’s most ancient enemy, the Deviants.

units.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
units.overview: Peter Parker is unmasked and no longer able to separate his normal life from the high-stakes of being a super-hero. When he asks for help from Doctor Strange the stakes become even more dangerous, forcing him to discover what it truly means to be Spider-Man.

units.title: Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness
units.overview: Doctor Strange, with the help of mystical allies both old and new, traverses the mind-bending and dangerous alternate realities of the Multiverse to confront a mysterious new adversary.

units.title: Hawkeye
units.overview: Former Avenger Clint Barton has a seemingly simple mission: get back to his family for Christmas. Possible? Maybe with the help of Kate Bishop, a 22-year-old archer with dreams of becoming a superhero. The two are forced to work together when a presence from Barton’s past threatens to derail far more than the festive spirit.

episodes.name: Never Meet Your Heroes
episodes.overview: Archer Kate Bishop lands in the middle of a criminal conspiracy, forcing Hawkeye out of retirement.

episodes.name: Hide and Seek
episodes.overview: Clint has to help Kate disentangle herself from the Tracksuit mafia and a real-life murder mystery.

episodes.name: Echoes
episodes.overview: After narrowly escaping the Tracksuits and their daunting leader Maya Lopez, Clint and Kate work together to find answers. With each step they take, however, they find themselves sliding deeper into a rapidly growing criminal conspiracy.

episodes.name: Partners, Am I Right?
episodes.overview: Secrets are revealed and hard truths emerge, culminating in a battle against two opposing forces.

episodes.name: Ronin
episodes.overview: After a fallout between Clint and Kate, the younger archer is ready to abandon her dream of becoming a hero. Meanwhile, a guilt-ridden Clint prepares to go face-to-face with the Tracksuit mafia, owning up to past actions. Everything changes, however, when Kate makes a surprising discovery.

episodes.name: So This Is Christmas?
episodes.overview: Clint and Kate’s partnership is tested as they face the consequences of exposing the conspiracy.

units.title: Moon Knight
units.overview: When Steven Grant, a mild-mannered gift-shop employee, becomes plagued with blackouts and memories of another life, he discovers he has dissociative identity disorder and shares a body with mercenary Marc Spector. As Steven/Marc’s enemies converge upon them, they must navigate their complex identities while thrust into a deadly mystery among the powerful gods of Egypt.

episodes.name: The Goldfish Problem
episodes.overview: Steven Grant, a mild-mannered man who works a mundane job, begins to suspect that his life may not be his own when an alter living inside him begins to emerge.

episodes.name: Summon the Suit
episodes.overview: As Steven reels from the fact that his life may not be his own, a mysterious partner emerges from the past as a war of the gods looms on the horizon.

episodes.name: The Friendly Type
episodes.overview: With Marc in the forefront and Harrow near Ammit’s tomb, Marc needs to navigate Cairo while putting his differences aside with Layla and Steven without jeopardizing their mission.

episodes.name: The Tomb
episodes.overview: Marc & Steven trek the Siwa Desert with Layla to find Ammit’s tomb, but the threats ahead look to protect the goddess’ resting place.

episodes.name: Asylum
episodes.overview: Marc & Steven search through their memories to find their truth or become left behind.

episodes.name: Gods and Monsters
episodes.overview: With Layla tracking down Harrow, Marc, Steven, and Khonshu must return to Cairo to stop Ammit as she looks to threaten humanity once more.

units.title: Black Panther: Wakanda Forever
units.overview: Queen Ramonda, Shuri, M’Baku, Okoye and the Dora Milaje fight to protect their nation from intervening world powers in the wake of King T’Challa’s death.  As the Wakandans strive to embrace their next chapter, the heroes must band together with the help of War Dog Nakia and Everett Ross and forge a new path for the kingdom of Wakanda.

units.title: Echo
units.overview: Pursued by Wilson Fisk's criminal empire, Maya's journey brings her home and she must confront her own family and legacy.

episodes.name: Chafa
episodes.overview: After her mother's tragic death, young Maya is forced to leave her hometown of Tamaha, Oklahoma, and move to New York City where she meets Wilson Fisk, aka Kingpin, who raises her to be a ruthless assassin. After learning that Fisk had her father killed, Maya kills Kingpin and flees NYC.

episodes.name: Lowak
episodes.overview: Maya enlists the help of her disapproving family to take down Fisk's army. Meanwhile, she begins experiencing strange visions.

episodes.name: Tuklo
episodes.overview: Maya learns the meaning of collateral damage as Fisk's ruthless army arrives in Tamaha, Oklahoma.

episodes.name: Taloa
episodes.overview: Maya finds herself at a crossroads, facing the shadows of her past and contemplating her future.

episodes.name: Maya
episodes.overview: The lives of Maya's family hang in the balance as Fisk's army invades the Choctaw Nation powwow.

units.title: She-Hulk: Attorney at Law
units.overview: Jennifer Walters navigates the complicated life of a single, 30-something attorney who also happens to be a green 6-foot-7-inch superpowered hulk.

episodes.name: A Normal Amount of Rage
episodes.overview: Jen Walters’s world is turned upside down after a freak accident leaves her with superpowers.

episodes.name: Superhuman Law
episodes.overview: Jen is hired at a prestigious law firm but must practice as She-Hulk and rep a complicated client.

episodes.name: The People vs. Emil Blonsky
episodes.overview: She-Hulk represents Emil Blonsky aka The Abomination, but his parole hearing doesn’t go as planned.

episodes.name: Is This Not Real Magic?
episodes.overview: She-Hulk’s new client Wong is suing a magician for unauthorized use of the Mystic Arts.

episodes.name: Mean, Green, and Straight Poured into These Jeans
episodes.overview: She-Hulk discovers Titania owns the name “She-Hulk” and is suing her for trademark infringement.

episodes.name: Just Jen
episodes.overview: Jen is a bridesmaid in a friend’s wedding, a stressful event compounded by uniquely She-Hulk issues.

episodes.name: The Retreat
episodes.overview: Jen visits Blonsky’s wellness retreat, meets new friends and gets in touch with her inner She-Hulk.

episodes.name: Ribbit and Rip It
episodes.overview: She-Hulk represents Leap-Frog who was injured due to a malfunction in his custom-made super suit.

episodes.name: Whose Show Is This?
episodes.overview: Jen finds herself in trouble with the law and struggles to pick up the pieces of her life.

units.title: Ms. Marvel
units.overview: A great student, avid gamer, and voracious fan-fic scribe, Kamala Khan has a special affinity for superheroes, particularly Captain Marvel. However, she struggles to fit in at home and at school — that is, until she gets superpowers like the heroes she’s always looked up to. Life is easier with superpowers, right?

episodes.name: Generation Why
episodes.overview: Kamala Khan attends Avengercon only to discover that she herself might have superpowers.

episodes.name: Crushed
episodes.overview: Kamala and Bruno explore the source of her newfound powers just in time for a perilous adventure.

episodes.name: Destined
episodes.overview: Ahead of Aamir’s wedding, Kamala may face grave consequences due to a crucial decision she makes.

episodes.name: Seeing Red
episodes.overview: Kamala travels around the world to solve the mystery of the bangle and her family’s history.

episodes.name: Time and Again
episodes.overview: The bangle reveals to Kamala secrets about her family lineage, as well as the truth behind the Veil.

episodes.name: No Normal
episodes.overview: Back in Jersey, Kamala finds Kamran and protects him from Damage Control who will stop at nothing to take him in.

units.title: Thor: Love and Thunder
units.overview: After his retirement is interrupted by Gorr the God Butcher, a galactic killer who seeks the extinction of the gods, Thor Odinson enlists the help of King Valkyrie, Korg, and ex-girlfriend Jane Foster, who now wields Mjolnir as the Mighty Thor. Together they embark upon a harrowing cosmic adventure to uncover the mystery of the God Butcher’s vengeance and stop him before it’s too late.

units.title: Ironheart
units.overview: After the events of Black Panther: Wakanda Forever, technology is pitted against magic when Riri Williams, a young, genius inventor determined to make her mark on the world, returns to her hometown of Chicago. Her unique take on building iron suits is brilliant, but in pursuit of her ambitions, she finds herself wrapped up with the mysterious yet charming Parker Robbins aka "The Hood."

episodes.name: Take Me Home
episodes.overview: Determined to complete her newest armored suit, Riri Williams teams up with Parker Robbins.

episodes.name: Will the Real Natalie Please Stand Up?
episodes.overview: Riri's new A.I. dredges up painful memories ahead of her first heist with Parker and his crew.

episodes.name: We in Danger, Girl
episodes.overview: Riri is uncomfortable being part of Parker's crew—two more heists, max, and she's out, she promises.

episodes.name: Bad Magic
episodes.overview: When Parker suspects Riri of wrongdoing, she knows she has to figure out the source of his powers.

episodes.name: Karma's a Glitch
episodes.overview: Riri sets out to create a suit unlike anything she has ever attempted—but at what cost?

episodes.name: The Past Is the Past
episodes.overview: Riri builds her most powerful suit yet, but she's unsure if it's enough to beat Parker and The Hood.

units.title: Werewolf by Night
units.overview: On a dark and somber night, a secret cabal of monster hunters emerge from the shadows and gather at the foreboding Bloodstone Temple following the death of their leader. In a strange and macabre memorial to the leader’s life, the attendees are thrust into a mysterious and deadly competition for a powerful relic—a hunt that will ultimately bring them face to face with a dangerous monster.

units.title: The Guardians of the Galaxy Holiday Special
units.overview: On a mission to make Christmas unforgettable for Quill, the Guardians head to Earth in search of the perfect present.

units.title: Ant-Man and the Wasp: Quantumania
units.overview: Super-Hero partners Scott Lang and Hope van Dyne, along with with Hope's parents Janet van Dyne and Hank Pym, and Scott's daughter Cassie Lang, find themselves exploring the Quantum Realm, interacting with strange new creatures and embarking on an adventure that will push them beyond the limits of what they thought possible.

units.title: Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3
units.overview: Peter Quill, still reeling from the loss of Gamora, must rally his team around him to defend the universe along with protecting one of their own. A mission that, if not completed successfully, could quite possibly lead to the end of the Guardians as we know them.

units.title: Secret Invasion
units.overview: Nick Fury and Talos discover a faction of shapeshifting Skrulls who have been infiltrating Earth for years.

episodes.name: Resurrection
episodes.overview: Nick Fury learns of a clandestine invasion of Earth by Skrulls.

episodes.name: Promises
episodes.overview: Fury grapples with past and present.

episodes.name: Betrayed
episodes.overview: Fury uncovers a rebel Skrull plot.

episodes.name: Beloved
episodes.overview: Fury must make some hard sacrifices.

episodes.name: Harvest
episodes.overview: Fury gathers his allies. Gravik deals with unrest.

episodes.name: Home
episodes.overview: All hope for humanity rests on Fury's shoulders.

units.title: The Marvels
units.overview: When her duties send her to an anomalous wormhole linked to a Kree revolutionary, Carol's powers become entangled with that of Jersey City super-fan Kamala Khan, aka Ms. Marvel, and Carol's estranged niece, now S.A.B.E.R. astronaut Captain Monica Rambeau. Together, this unlikely trio must team up and learn to work in concert to save the universe.

units.title: Loki (Season 2)
units.overview: After stealing the Tesseract during the events of “Avengers: Endgame,” an alternate version of Loki is brought to the mysterious Time Variance Authority, a bureaucratic organization that exists outside of time and space and monitors the timeline. They give Loki a choice: face being erased from existence due to being a “time variant” or help fix the timeline and stop a greater threat.

episodes.name: Ouroboros
episodes.overview: Loki finds himself lost to time and torn, quite literally, between past, present and future.

episodes.name: Breaking Brad
episodes.overview: With the TVA on the verge of a temporal meltdown, Loki & Mobius will stop at nothing to find Sylvie.
Loki & Mobius go on the hunt to find everyone’s favorite cartoon clock as they try to save the TVA.

episodes.name: Heart of the TVA
episodes.overview: The TVA's Loom nears catastrophic failure but Loki, Mobius and Sylvie have a He Who Remains variant.

episodes.name: Science/Fiction
episodes.overview: Loki traverses dying timelines in an attempt to find his friends, but Reality is not what it seems.

episodes.name: Glorious Purpose
episodes.overview: Loki learns the true nature of 'glorious purpose' as he rectifies the past.

units.title: What If…? (Season 2)
units.overview: Taking inspiration from the comic books of the same name, each episode of this animated anthology series questions, revisits and twists classic Marvel Cinematic moments.

episodes.name: What If... Nebula Joined the Nova Corps?
episodes.overview: When Nebula is recruited to join the Nova Corps, she sets out to prove her detective skills.

episodes.name: What If... Peter Quill Attacked Earth's Mightiest Heroes?
episodes.overview: When Ego and a young Peter Quill threaten Earth in 1988, Howard Stark and Peggy Carter form a team.

episodes.name: What If... Happy Hogan Saved Christmas?
episodes.overview: When Avengers Tower is attacked during the holiday party, Happy Hogan must prove his hero chops.

episodes.name: What If... Iron Man Crashed Into the Grandmaster?
episodes.overview: Tony Stark challenges The Grandmaster, leading to a grand prix-turned-demolition-derby death match.

episodes.name: What If... Captain Carter Fought the Hydra Stomper?
episodes.overview: Captain Carter's mission to save Steve Rogers sets her on a collision course with new enemies.

episodes.name: What If... Kahhori Reshaped the World?
episodes.overview: A Mohawk woman ventures into the waters of the Forbidden Lake to help save her people.

episodes.name: What If... Hela Found the Ten Rings?
episodes.overview: Hela—stripped of her powers and banished to Earth—comes across a new source of power: the Ten Rings.

episodes.name: What If... The Avengers Assembled in 1602?
episodes.overview: Captain Carter tries to undo the anomaly that strands familiar heroes and villains in the year 1602.

episodes.name: What If... Strange Supreme Intervened?
episodes.overview: Captain Carter discovers the greatest threat to all existence may be closer than she realizes.

units.title: Deadpool & Wolverine
units.overview: A listless Wade Wilson toils away in civilian life with his days as the morally flexible mercenary, Deadpool, behind him. But when his homeworld faces an existential threat, Wade must reluctantly suit-up again with an even more reluctant Wolverine.

units.title: Agatha All Along
units.overview: Agatha Harkness gathers a coven of witches and sets off down, down, down The Witches' Road.

episodes.name: Seekest Thou the Road
episodes.overview: In small town Westview, Detective Agnes' murder case sends her down a road that changes everything.

episodes.name: Circle Sewn with Fate / Unlock Thy Hidden Gate
episodes.overview: With old foes in hot pursuit, Agatha and Teen gather a desperate coven to walk The Witches' Road.

episodes.name: Through Many Miles / Of Tricks and Trials
episodes.overview: The coven faces their first perilous trial on The Witches' Road.

episodes.name: If I Can't Reach You / Let My Song Teach You
episodes.overview: The coven faces their second trial on The Witches' Road.

episodes.name: Darkest Hour / Wake Thy Power
episodes.overview: With enemies closing in, the coven flees under the light of a blood moon to the next ghastly trial.

episodes.name: Familiar by Thy Side
episodes.overview: Familiar Teen is much more than he seems, and his connections to the rest of the coven are revealed.

episodes.name: Death's Hand in Mine
episodes.overview: Those remaining suffer the hand they are dealt in the next trial.

episodes.name: Follow Me My Friend / To Glory at the End
episodes.overview: The end of The Road.

episodes.name: Maiden Mother Crone
episodes.overview: The truth of Agatha Harkness and The Witches' Road.

units.title: What If…? (Season 3)
units.overview: Taking inspiration from the comic books of the same name, each episode of this animated anthology series questions, revisits and twists classic Marvel Cinematic moments.

episodes.name: What If... The Hulk Fought the Mech Avengers?
episodes.overview: Captain America/Sam Wilson must suit up in a colossal mech suit to battle Bruce Banner after an attempt to cure himself of the Hulk goes horribly wrong. Bucky Barnes, Monica Rambeau, Moon Knight, and others must join Sam as his new team of Mech Avengers.

episodes.name: What If... Agatha Went to Hollywood?
episodes.overview: On the set of Stark Pictures' first production, the playboy auteur quickly finds himself enchanted by his bewitching lead actress, Agatha Harkness. Little does she know there will be another superpower co-star on the call sheet… Kingo.

episodes.name: What If... The Red Guardian Stopped the Winter Soldier?
episodes.overview: It is 1991, and the Red Guardian takes it upon himself to join a high-profile mission and prove himself to his Red Room superiors. When his antics interfere with the Winter Soldier's own mission to kill Howard Stark, the two Soviet supersoldiers must form an alliance to escape the United States.

episodes.name: What If... Howard the Duck Got Hitched?
episodes.overview: Howard the Duck and Darcy Lewis find themselves on an intergalactic pleasure cruise. When dangerous factions from across the galaxy descend to threaten their trip, they must discover their own cosmic powers to withstand the onslaught.

episodes.name: What If... The Emergence Destroyed the Earth?
episodes.overview: In a Universe where The Eternals never stopped The Emergence, the birth of an incubating Celestial shatters the Earth. Civilization endures on the rocky remnants of our planet, where Quentin Beck leads an authoritarian regime until freedom fighters recruit Riri Williams on a deadly mission to take him down.

episodes.name: What If... 1872?
episodes.overview: In a universe where the heroes of the MCU live in the Old West, Shang-Chi and his pistol-packing partner, Kate Bishop, traverse the frontier, saving the innocent from the evils of The Hood.

episodes.name: What If... The Watcher Disappeared? (1)
episodes.overview: The Watcher must stand trial for his many interventions.

episodes.name: What If... What If? (2)
episodes.overview: The end of the beginning...

units.title: Daredevil: Born Again (Season 1)
units.overview: Matt Murdock, a blind lawyer with heightened abilities, is fighting for justice through his bustling law firm, while former mob boss Wilson Fisk pursues his own political endeavors in New York. When their past identities begin to emerge, both men find themselves on an inevitable collision course.

episodes.name: Heaven's Half Hour
episodes.overview: Matt Murdock gives up the mask. Wilson Fisk has his sights set to new heights.

episodes.name: Optics
episodes.overview: Matt Murdock gets a new client who's more than he claims to be. Fisk learns the power of optics.

episodes.name: The Hollow of His Hand
episodes.overview: The trial of Hector Ayala begins. Fisk's old business associates seek to claim his vacant mantle.

episodes.name: Sic Semper Systema
episodes.overview: Matt Murdock and Wilson Fisk's darker halves fight to be unleashed.

episodes.name: With Interest
episodes.overview: A day in the life of Matt Murdock gets intense, forcing him to team up with a familiar face.

episodes.name: Excessive Force
episodes.overview: When a serial killer terrorizes the streets of New York, the city needs a savior.

episodes.name: Art for Art's Sake
episodes.overview: Daredevil is back and races Fisk to stop Muse from killing again.

episodes.name: Isle of Joy
episodes.overview: At his inaugural Black and White Ball, Mayor Fisk tightens his grip on New York City.

episodes.name: Straight to Hell
episodes.overview: Mayor Fisk becomes Mayor Kingpin, and Daredevil is unleashed as chaos takes over the city.

units.title: Captain America: Brave New World
units.overview: After meeting with newly elected U.S. President Thaddeus Ross, Sam finds himself in the middle of an international incident. He must discover the reason behind a nefarious global plot before the true mastermind has the entire world seeing red.

units.title: Thunderbolts*
units.overview: After finding themselves ensnared in a death trap, seven disillusioned castoffs must embark on a dangerous mission that will force them to confront the darkest corners of their pasts.

units.title: The Fantastic Four: First Steps
units.overview: Against the vibrant backdrop of a 1960s-inspired, retro-futuristic world, Marvel's First Family is forced to balance their roles as heroes with the strength of their family bond, while defending Earth from a ravenous space god called Galactus and his enigmatic Herald, Silver Surfer.

units.title: Daredevil: Born Again (Season 2)
units.overview: Matt Murdock, a blind lawyer with heightened abilities, is fighting for justice through his bustling law firm, while former mob boss Wilson Fisk pursues his own political endeavors in New York. When their past identities begin to emerge, both men find themselves on an inevitable collision course.

episodes.name: The Northern Star
episodes.overview: Daredevil is in hiding, but he isn't laying low. A shadowy player from Washington, D.C. emerges.

episodes.name: Shoot the Moon
episodes.overview: Fisk tries a new tactic to lure Daredevil out of hiding.

episodes.name: The Scales & the Sword
episodes.overview: Matt Murdock and Karen Page find new allies.

episodes.name: Gloves Off
episodes.overview: Bullseye adopts a new morning routine. Fisk takes the ring.

episodes.name: The Grand Design
episodes.overview: The Anti-Vigilante Task Force intensifies its search for Daredevil and Bullseye.

episodes.name: Requiem
episodes.overview: Fisk's operation is dealt an irrevocable blow. The resistance spills over into the streets.

episodes.name: The Hateful Darkness
episodes.overview: A trial close to Matt Murdock's heart grabs the city's attention.

episodes.name: The Southern Cross
episodes.overview: The city and its heroes enter an unprecedented era.

units.title: The Punisher: One Last Kill
units.overview: As Frank Castle searches for meaning beyond revenge, an unexpected force pulls him back into the fight.

units.title: Marvel Zombies
units.overview: After the Avengers are overtaken by a zombie plague, a desperate group of survivors discover the key to bringing an end to the super-powered undead, racing across a dystopian landscape and risking life and limb to save their world.

episodes.name: Episode 1
episodes.overview: Lone survivors face an unforgiving world of horrors.

episodes.name: Episode 2
episodes.overview: On the open road, the hunger for flesh rules all.

episodes.name: Episode 3
episodes.overview: The rotting dead will taste their fear.

episodes.name: Episode 4
episodes.overview: A bloody end.

units.title: Your Friendly Neighborhood Spider-Man
units.overview: Peter Parker is on his way to becoming a hero, but his path to get there is anything but ordinary.

episodes.name: Amazing Fantasy
episodes.overview: During high school orientation Peter's life is forever changed. A new era of Spider-Man begins here!

episodes.name: The Parker Luck
episodes.overview: Peter begins an exclusive internship, but his first day is way more complicated than he expected.

episodes.name: Secret Identity Crisis
episodes.overview: Peter deals with the fallout of his secret revealed. Meanwhile, Lonnie's perfect life falls apart.

episodes.name: Hitting the Big Time
episodes.overview: Peter and Norman work through creative differences, while Lonnie undergoes a loyalty test.

episodes.name: The Unicorn Unleashed
episodes.overview: Peter makes a new friend. Meanwhile, Lonnie finds himself in the sights of a dangerous gang.

episodes.name: Duel with the Devil
episodes.overview: Peter's night off is derailed when he must suit up to stop a mysterious intruder.

episodes.name: Scorpion Rising
episodes.overview: Peter and Lonnie face the consequences of their secret lives. Spider-Man faces his biggest threat.

episodes.name: Tangled Web
episodes.overview: Norman gives Spider-Man an ultimatum, causing Peter to do some soul-searching.

episodes.name: Hero or Menace
episodes.overview: Spider-Man swings into action, as Lonnie looks to settle a score and Norman visits an old friend.

episodes.name: If This Be My Destiny...
episodes.overview: Peter's internship takes a dark turn with the arrival of an unexpected visitor.

units.title: X-Men '97
units.overview: The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a dangerous and unexpected new future.

episodes.name: To Me, My X-Men
episodes.overview: Cyclops races to find the source of new anti-mutant technology.

episodes.name: Mutant Liberation Begins
episodes.overview: When Magneto is forced by the UN to stand trial, a group of anti-mutant rioters test his resolve.

episodes.name: Fire Made Flesh
episodes.overview: The team is propelled into a tragic confrontation with an immortal mad scientist.

episodes.name: Motendo / Lifedeath (1)
episodes.overview: Jubilee must relive the X-Men's greatest adventures when she's transported into a 16-bit video game.

episodes.name: Remember It
episodes.overview: Team members hit Genosha as UN honorees while a press event risks exposing the team's dirty laundry.

episodes.name: Lifedeath (2)
episodes.overview: Storm is forced to face her worst fears in order to free herself.

episodes.name: Bright Eyes
episodes.overview: The X-Men finds Sentinel inventor Bolivar Trask, realizing they've been played by a mastermind.

episodes.name: Tolerance Is Extinction (1)
episodes.overview: The X-Men must unite to face a new threat.

episodes.name: Tolerance Is Extinction (2)
episodes.overview: The X-Men work to settle the score before it is too late.

episodes.name: Tolerance Is Extinction (3)
episodes.overview: The X-Men's dream is put to the test as mutant-human relations reach a tipping point.
